title: "Spatial Multi-Omics Preprocessing for CellWalker2"
author: "AI Assistant"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = T, warning = T, cache = FALSE, dev = "png", fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8)
```


```{r load functions, message=FALSE}
# source('/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/all_graph_functions.R')
# source('/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/adjusted_mapCellTypes_functions.R')

.libPaths(c("/projectnb/paxlab/presh/env/R_4.5.2/ArchR_libs", "/projectnb/paxlab/presh/env/R_4.5.2/giotto_libs", .libPaths()))
library(ArchR)
library(Giotto)

source("/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/analysis/src/cellwalkr/all_graph_functions.R")
source("/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/analysis/src/cellwalkr/adjusted_mapCellTypes_functions.R")


# Load reticulate and point to the new environment
# library(reticulate)
# Replace 'preshita' with your actual username if different
# use_condaenv("/projectnb/paxlab/presh/env/conda_env/cellwalkr_env", required = TRUE)
# Verify the correct Python version is being used
# py_config()

```

# Preparing the data 
```{r data paths}
# Xenium RNA-seq data
XENIUM_H5_PATH <- "/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Xenium/output-XETG00253__0048833__488A__20241217__182301/cell_feature_matrix.h5"
XENIUM_CELLS_CSV_PATH <- "/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Xenium/output-XETG00253__0048833__488A__20241217__182301/cells.csv.gz"

# Spatial ATAC-seq AnnData (.h5ad)
ATAC_H5AD_PATH <- "/projectnb/paxlab/DATA/DriesSpatial/Atlasxomics/D1942_deepseq/ultima1942optimize/set1_vf25000-cr1-0-vi1-nc30/combined.h5ad"


output_philipp <- "/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/processed_data"
output_dir <- "/projectnb/paxlab/presh/projects/spatial_atac/Data/cellwalkr"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```


```{r Execute Spatial Multi-Omics Preprocessing}
# Define filtering parameters (adjust as per your data's spatial extent)
my_filter_params <- list(
  x_min_rna = 4700, x_max_rna = 10100, 
  x_min_atac = -Inf, x_max_atac = Inf, # Keep ATAC x-range broad for imputation
  y_min_rna = -Inf, y_max_rna = Inf, 
  y_min_atac = 4000, y_max_atac = Inf,
  proximity_radius = 50, 
  min_neighbors_rna = 10, min_neighbors_atac = 5
)

# Run the full preprocessing pipeline
preprocessed_data <- preprocessSpatialMultiomics(
  rna_h5_path = XENIUM_H5_PATH,
  cells_csv_path = XENIUM_CELLS_CSV_PATH,
  atac_h5ad_path = ATAC_H5AD_PATH,
  atac_x_col = "xcor", 
  atac_y_col = "ycor", 
  genome = "hg38", 
  mirror_rna_y = TRUE, 
  filter_params = my_filter_params
)

# Extract results
seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed <- preprocessed_data$seurat_obj_rna
rna_spatial_coords_filtered <- preprocessed_data$rna_spatial_coords
atac_counts_matrix_filtered <- preprocessed_data$atac_counts_matrix
atac_peaks_gr_filtered <- preprocessed_data$atac_peaks_gr
atac_spatial_coords_filtered <- preprocessed_data$atac_spatial_coords

saveRDS(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, file.path(output_dir, 'seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed.rds'))
saveRDS(rna_spatial_coords_filtered, file.path(output_dir, 'rna_spatial_coords_filtered.rds'))
saveRDS(atac_counts_matrix_filtered, file.path(output_dir, 'atac_counts_matrix_filtered.rds'))
saveRDS(atac_peaks_gr_filtered, file.path(output_dir, 'atac_peaks_gr_filtered.rds'))
saveRDS(atac_spatial_coords_filtered, file.path(output_dir, 'atac_spatial_coords_filtered.rds'))

message("Summary of preprocessed data:")
message("  RNA Seurat object (genes x cells): ", paste(dim(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed), collapse = "x"))
message("  RNA spatial coordinates (cells x 2): ", paste(dim(rna_spatial_coords_filtered), collapse = "x"))
message("  ATAC counts matrix (cells x peaks): ", paste(dim(atac_counts_matrix_filtered), collapse = "x"))
message("  ATAC peaks GRanges: ", length(atac_peaks_gr_filtered), " regions")
message("  ATAC spatial coordinates (cells x 2): ", paste(dim(atac_spatial_coords_filtered), collapse = "x"))

# Plot the filtered spatial data
p_filtered_spatial <- plot_spatial_rna_atac(
  rna_spatial_coords_filtered, 
  atac_spatial_coords_filtered, 
  same_limits = TRUE,
  rna_title = "Filtered Spatial RNA-seq",
  atac_title = "Filtered Spatial ATAC-seq"
)
print(p_filtered_spatial)
```


# Reading in the data 

```{r}
seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed <- readRDS( file.path(output_dir, 'seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed.rds'))
rna_spatial_coords_filtered <- readRDS( file.path(output_dir, 'rna_spatial_coords_filtered.rds'))
atac_counts_matrix_filtered <- readRDS(file.path(output_dir, 'atac_counts_matrix_filtered.rds'))
atac_peaks_gr_filtered <-  readRDS(file.path(output_dir, 'atac_peaks_gr_filtered.rds'))
atac_spatial_coords_filtered <- readRDS( file.path(output_dir, 'atac_spatial_coords_filtered.rds'))

```



# Registering the data

## Manual affine 
```{r}
registerSpatialCoordinates <- function(coords1, coords2, plot = TRUE) {
  
  message("Registering spatial coordinates using tissue alignment...")
  
  p1 <- as.matrix(coords1[, c("x", "y")])
  p2 <- as.matrix(coords2[, c("x", "y")])
  
  message(paste("coords1:", nrow(p1), "points"))
  message(paste("coords2:", nrow(p2), "points"))
  
  # Center both tissues
  center1 <- colMeans(p1)
  center2 <- colMeans(p2)
  p1_centered <- sweep(p1, 2, center1)
  p2_centered <- sweep(p2, 2, center2)
  
  message(paste("Center p1:", round(center1[1]), ",", round(center1[2])))
  message(paste("Center p2:", round(center2[1]), ",", round(center2[2])))
  
  # Compute principal axes (SVD)
  svd1 <- svd(p1_centered)
  svd2 <- svd(p2_centered)
  
  # Get orientation (first principal component)
  angle1 <- atan2(svd1$v[2, 1], svd1$v[1, 1])
  angle2 <- atan2(svd2$v[2, 1], svd2$v[1, 1])
  
  # Find shortest rotation angle
  rotation_angle <- angle2 - angle1
  
  # Normalize to [-pi, pi]
  while (rotation_angle > pi) rotation_angle <- rotation_angle - 2*pi
  while (rotation_angle < -pi) rotation_angle <- rotation_angle + 2*pi
  
  # If close to 180°, try the opposite direction
  if (abs(rotation_angle) > pi/2) {
    message("Large rotation detected, checking alternate orientation...")
    # Try flipping p2's principal axis
    angle2_alt <- atan2(-svd2$v[2, 1], -svd2$v[1, 1])
    rotation_angle_alt <- angle2_alt - angle1
    while (rotation_angle_alt > pi) rotation_angle_alt <- rotation_angle_alt - 2*pi
    while (rotation_angle_alt < -pi) rotation_angle_alt <- rotation_angle_alt + 2*pi
    
    if (abs(rotation_angle_alt) < abs(rotation_angle)) {
      message("Using alternate orientation")
      rotation_angle <- rotation_angle_alt
    }
  }
  
  message(paste("Angle p1:", round(angle1 * 180/pi, 1), "degrees"))
  message(paste("Angle p2:", round(angle2 * 180/pi, 1), "degrees"))
  message(paste("Rotation needed:", round(rotation_angle * 180/pi, 1), "degrees"))
  
  # Build rotation matrix
  cos_a <- cos(rotation_angle)
  sin_a <- sin(rotation_angle)
  rotation <- matrix(c(cos_a, -sin_a, sin_a, cos_a), 2, 2)
  
  # Compute scale from variance ratio
  var1 <- sum(svd1$d^2) / nrow(p1_centered)
  var2 <- sum(svd2$d^2) / nrow(p2_centered)
  scale_factor <- sqrt(var2 / var1)
  
  message(paste("Variance p1:", round(var1, 2)))
  message(paste("Variance p2:", round(var2, 2)))
  message(paste("Scale factor:", round(scale_factor, 4)))
  
  # Transform p1 to p2 space
  # 1. Scale
  p1_scaled <- p1_centered * scale_factor
  # 2. Rotate
  p1_rotated <- p1_scaled %*% rotation
  # 3. Translate to p2 center
  p1_transformed <- sweep(p1_rotated, 2, center2, FUN = "+")
  
  message("Transformation complete")
  
  # Plot
  if (plot) {
    par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
    
    # Before
    xlim_before <- range(c(p1[, 1], p2[, 1]))
    ylim_before <- range(c(p1[, 2], p2[, 2]))
    
    plot(NA, xlim = xlim_before, ylim = ylim_before, 
         main = "Before Registration", xlab = "X", ylab = "Y", asp = 1)
    points(p1, col = rgb(1, 0, 0, 0.15), pch = 16, cex = 0.1)
    points(p2, col = rgb(0, 0, 1, 0.15), pch = 16, cex = 0.1)
    legend("topright", c("RNA", "ATAC"), col = c("red", "blue"), pch = 16, cex = 0.8)
    
    # After
    xlim_after <- range(c(p1_transformed[, 1], p2[, 1]))
    ylim_after <- range(c(p1_transformed[, 2], p2[, 2]))
    
    plot(NA, xlim = xlim_after, ylim = ylim_after,
         main = "After Registration", xlab = "X", ylab = "Y", asp = 1)
    points(p1_transformed, col = rgb(1, 0, 0, 0.15), pch = 16, cex = 0.1)
    points(p2, col = rgb(0, 0, 1, 0.15), pch = 16, cex = 0.1)
    legend("topright", c("RNA (transformed)", "ATAC"), col = c("red", "blue"), pch = 16, cex = 0.8)
    
    par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  }
  
  list(
    coords1_transformed = p1_transformed,
    coords1_original = p1,
    coords2_original = p2,
    rotation_angle = rotation_angle,
    scale_factor = scale_factor,
    center1 = center1,
    center2 = center2
  )
}
```

```{r}
result <- registerSpatialCoordinates(
  coords1 = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  coords2 = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  plot = TRUE
)

rna_aligned <- result$coords1_transformed

cat("Rotation:", round(result$rotation_angle * 180/pi, 1), "degrees\n")
cat("Scale:", result$scale_factor, "\n")
```


## Fine-tuning - needs work 

```{r}
registerSpatialCoordinates <- function(coords1, coords2, plot = TRUE, fine_tune_edges = TRUE) {
  
  message("Registering spatial coordinates using tissue alignment...")
  
  p1 <- as.matrix(coords1[, c("x", "y")])
  p2 <- as.matrix(coords2[, c("x", "y")])
  
  message(paste("coords1:", nrow(p1), "points"))
  message(paste("coords2:", nrow(p2), "points"))
  
  # Center both tissues
  center1 <- colMeans(p1)
  center2 <- colMeans(p2)
  p1_centered <- sweep(p1, 2, center1)
  p2_centered <- sweep(p2, 2, center2)
  
  # Compute principal axes (SVD)
  svd1 <- svd(p1_centered)
  svd2 <- svd(p2_centered)
  
  # Get orientation
  angle1 <- atan2(svd1$v[2, 1], svd1$v[1, 1])
  angle2 <- atan2(svd2$v[2, 1], svd2$v[1, 1])
  
  rotation_angle <- angle2 - angle1
  while (rotation_angle > pi) rotation_angle <- rotation_angle - 2*pi
  while (rotation_angle < -pi) rotation_angle <- rotation_angle + 2*pi
  
  # Try alternate orientation if needed
  if (abs(rotation_angle) > pi/2) {
    angle2_alt <- atan2(-svd2$v[2, 1], -svd2$v[1, 1])
    rotation_angle_alt <- angle2_alt - angle1
    while (rotation_angle_alt > pi) rotation_angle_alt <- rotation_angle_alt - 2*pi
    while (rotation_angle_alt < -pi) rotation_angle_alt <- rotation_angle_alt + 2*pi
    if (abs(rotation_angle_alt) < abs(rotation_angle)) rotation_angle <- rotation_angle_alt
  }
  
  # Build rotation matrix
  cos_a <- cos(rotation_angle)
  sin_a <- sin(rotation_angle)
  rotation <- matrix(c(cos_a, -sin_a, sin_a, cos_a), 2, 2)
  
  # Compute scale
  var1 <- sum(svd1$d^2) / nrow(p1_centered)
  var2 <- sum(svd2$d^2) / nrow(p2_centered)
  scale_factor <- sqrt(var2 / var1)
  
  message(paste("Rotation:", round(rotation_angle * 180/pi, 1), "degrees"))
  message(paste("Scale factor:", round(scale_factor, 4)))
  
  # Global transformation
  p1_scaled <- p1_centered * scale_factor
  p1_rotated <- p1_scaled %*% rotation
  p1_transformed <- sweep(p1_rotated, 2, center2, FUN = "+")
  
  # Fine-tune edges if requested
  if (fine_tune_edges) {
    message("Fine-tuning tissue edges...")
    p1_transformed <- finetuneEdges(p1_transformed, p2, p1, center1, rotation, scale_factor, center2)
  }
  
  message("Transformation complete")
  
  # Plot with better visibility
  if (plot) {
    par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
    
    # Before
    xlim_before <- range(c(p1[, 1], p2[, 1]))
    ylim_before <- range(c(p1[, 2], p2[, 2]))
    
    plot(NA, xlim = xlim_before, ylim = ylim_before, 
         main = "Before Registration", xlab = "X", ylab = "Y", asp = 1, bg = "white")
    points(p1, col = rgb(1, 0, 0, 0.2), pch = 16, cex = 0.15)
    points(p2, col = rgb(0.2, 0.4, 1, 0.4), pch = 16, cex = 0.15)  # More visible blue
    legend("topright", c("RNA", "ATAC"), col = c("red", rgb(0.2, 0.4, 1, 0.8)), pch = 16, cex = 0.8)
    
    # After - plot ATAC first, then RNA on top
    xlim_after <- range(c(p1_transformed[, 1], p2[, 1]))
    ylim_after <- range(c(p1_transformed[, 2], p2[, 2]))
    
    plot(NA, xlim = xlim_after, ylim = ylim_after,
         main = "After Registration", xlab = "X", ylab = "Y", asp = 1, bg = "white")
    points(p2, col = rgb(0.2, 0.4, 1, 0.4), pch = 16, cex = 0.15)  # Plot ATAC first (blue)
    points(p1_transformed, col = rgb(1, 0, 0, 0.2), pch = 16, cex = 0.15)  # RNA on top (red)
    legend("topright", c("RNA (transformed)", "ATAC"), col = c("red", rgb(0.2, 0.4, 1, 0.8)), pch = 16, cex = 0.8)
    
    par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  }
  
  list(
    coords1_transformed = p1_transformed,
    rotation_angle = rotation_angle,
    scale_factor = scale_factor
  )
}

# Helper function for edge fine-tuning
finetuneEdges <- function(p1_transformed, p2, p1_orig, center1, rotation, scale_factor, center2) {
  
  # Find top and bottom edges (based on Y coordinate)
  y_orig <- p1_orig[, 2]
  y_top_idx <- which(y_orig > quantile(y_orig, 0.9))    # Top 10%
  y_bottom_idx <- which(y_orig < quantile(y_orig, 0.1)) # Bottom 10%
  
  message(paste("  Top edge: ", length(y_top_idx), "points"))
  message(paste("  Bottom edge:", length(y_bottom_idx), "points"))
  
  # For each edge, compute local adjustment
  p1_transformed <- adjustEdgeRegion(p1_transformed, p2, y_top_idx, "top")
  p1_transformed <- adjustEdgeRegion(p1_transformed, p2, y_bottom_idx, "bottom")
  
  p1_transformed
}

# Helper: Adjust specific edge region
adjustEdgeRegion <- function(p1_transformed, p2, idx, edge_name) {
  
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(p1_transformed)
  
  # Get points in this region
  p1_edge <- p1_transformed[idx, ]
  
  # Find nearest neighbors in p2 for this region
  library(FNN)
  nn <- get.knnx(p2, p1_edge, k = 5)
  
  # Compute average displacement needed
  displacements <- matrix(0, nrow(p1_edge), 2)
  for (i in 1:nrow(p1_edge)) {
    neighbors <- p2[nn$nn.index[i, ], ]
    avg_neighbor <- colMeans(neighbors)
    displacements[i, ] <- avg_neighbor - p1_edge[i, ]
  }
  
  # Smooth displacement field
  smooth_disp <- apply(displacements, 2, function(x) {
    ksmooth(1:length(x), x, kernel = "box", bandwidth = max(5, length(x)/20))$y
  })
  
  # Apply smooth displacement (with falloff from edge)
  p1_transformed[idx, ] <- p1_edge + smooth_disp * 1  # 50% of suggested correction
  
  p1_transformed
}
```


```{r}
result <- registerSpatialCoordinates(
  coords1 = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  coords2 = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  plot = TRUE,
  fine_tune_edges = TRUE  # Enable edge fine-tuning
)

rna_aligned <- result$coords1_transformed


# Test different edge layer thicknesses and find the best
result <- registerSpatialCoordinates(
  coords1 = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  coords2 = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  edge_layer_pcts = c(0.05, 0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25),  # Test 5%, 10%, 15%, 20%, 25%
  test_best = TRUE,  # Enable testing
  plot = TRUE
)

# Extract best result
rna_aligned <- result$coords1_transformed
best_pct <- result$best_edge_layer_pct

cat("Best edge layer percentage:", best_pct * 100, "%\n")
print(result$metrics)
```


```{r}
result <- registerSpatialCoordinates(
  coords1 = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  coords2 = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  edge_layer_pcts = c(0.05, 0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25),  # Test 5%, 10%, 15%, 20%, 25%
  test_best = TRUE,  # Enable testing
  plot = TRUE
)
```



```{r}
# Single refinement pass (FIXED)
refineTransformationPass <- function(p1_transformed, p2, p1_orig, edge_layer_pct, adj_factor) {
  
  library(FNN)
  
  # Find nearest neighbors for ALL points
  nn <- get.knnx(p2, p1_transformed, k = 20)
  
  # For each point, compute weighted average of nearest neighbors
  adjustments <- matrix(0, nrow(p1_transformed), 2)
  for (i in 1:nrow(p1_transformed)) {
    neighbors <- p2[nn$nn.index[i, ], ]
    distances <- nn$nn.dist[i, ]
    
    # Weight by inverse distance (closer neighbors have more weight)
    weights <- 1 / (distances + 1e-6)
    weights <- weights / sum(weights)
    
    weighted_avg <- colSums(neighbors * weights)
    adjustments[i, ] <- weighted_avg - p1_transformed[i, ]
  }
  
  # Identify edge points and increase adjustment there
  y_orig <- p1_orig[, 2]
  y_range <- max(y_orig) - min(y_orig)
  threshold_top <- max(y_orig) - (edge_layer_pct * y_range)
  threshold_bottom <- min(y_orig) + (edge_layer_pct * y_range)
  
  edge_idx <- which(y_orig > threshold_top | y_orig < threshold_bottom)
  
  # Apply larger adjustment to edge points
  adjustment_factor <- rep(adj_factor * 0.3, nrow(p1_transformed))  # Base adjustment
  adjustment_factor[edge_idx] <- adj_factor  # Stronger at edges
  
  # Smooth adjustment field
  smooth_adj <- apply(adjustments, 2, function(x) {
    if (length(unique(x)) > 1) {
      smooth.spline(1:length(x), x, spar = 0.3)$y
    } else {
      x
    }
  })
  
  # Apply smoothed adjustment
  p1_transformed + (smooth_adj * adjustment_factor)
}

# Fixed initialization in main function
registerSpatialCoordinatesIterative <- function(coords1, coords2, 
                                                 edge_layer_pcts = c(0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25, 0.3),
                                                 adjustment_factors = c(0.5, 0.7, 0.9),
                                                 n_iterations = 5,
                                                 test_best = TRUE) {
  
  library(FNN)
  
  message("Iterative registration with refinement...")
  
  p1 <- as.matrix(coords1[, c("x", "y")])
  p2 <- as.matrix(coords2[, c("x", "y")])
  
  message(paste("coords1:", nrow(p1), "points"))
  message(paste("coords2:", nrow(p2), "points"))
  
  # Global transformation
  result_global <- computeGlobalTransform(p1, p2)
  rotation <- result_global$rotation
  scale_factor <- result_global$scale_factor
  center1 <- result_global$center1
  center2 <- result_global$center2
  p1_centered <- result_global$p1_centered
  
  message(paste("Global rotation:", round(result_global$rotation_angle * 180/pi, 1), "degrees"))
  message(paste("Global scale:", round(scale_factor, 4)))
  
  # Test different combinations
  best_error <- Inf
  best_result <- NULL
  results_comparison <- data.frame()
  
  for (edge_pct in edge_layer_pcts) {
    for (adj_factor in adjustment_factors) {
      
      message(paste("\nTesting edge_layer:", edge_pct*100, "% + adjustment:", adj_factor))
      
      # Start with global transform (FIXED - proper order of operations)
      p1_scaled <- p1_centered * scale_factor
      p1_rotated <- p1_scaled %*% rotation
      p1_transformed <- sweep(p1_rotated, 2, center2, FUN = "+")
      
      # Apply iterative refinement
      for (iter in 1:n_iterations) {
        p1_transformed <- refineTransformationPass(
          p1_transformed, p2, p1, edge_pct, adj_factor
        )
      }
      
      # Compute error
      nn <- get.knnx(p2, p1_transformed, k = 1)
      dists <- sqrt(rowSums((p1_transformed - p2[nn$nn.index[, 1], ])^2))
      overall_error <- mean(dists)
      
      # Edge-specific error
      y_orig <- p1[, 2]
      threshold_top <- max(y_orig) - (edge_pct * (max(y_orig) - min(y_orig)))
      threshold_bottom <- min(y_orig) + (edge_pct * (max(y_orig) - min(y_orig)))
      edge_idx <- which(y_orig > threshold_top | y_orig < threshold_bottom)
      edge_error <- if (length(edge_idx) > 0) mean(dists[edge_idx]) else NA
      
      # Core error (non-edge)
      core_idx <- which(y_orig <= threshold_top & y_orig >= threshold_bottom)
      core_error <- if (length(core_idx) > 0) mean(dists[core_idx]) else NA
      
      message(paste("  Overall error:", round(overall_error, 2)))
      message(paste("  Edge error:", round(edge_error, 2)))
      message(paste("  Core error:", round(core_error, 2)))
      
      results_comparison <- rbind(results_comparison, data.frame(
        edge_layer_pct = edge_pct,
        adjustment_factor = adj_factor,
        overall_error = overall_error,
        edge_error = edge_error,
        core_error = core_error
      ))
      
      if (overall_error < best_error) {
        best_error <- overall_error
        best_result <- list(
          p1_transformed = p1_transformed,
          edge_pct = edge_pct,
          adj_factor = adj_factor,
          errors = list(
            overall = overall_error,
            edge = edge_error,
            core = core_error
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  message(paste("\n*** BEST RESULT ***"))
  message(paste("Edge layer:", best_result$edge_pct * 100, "%"))
  message(paste("Adjustment factor:", best_result$adj_factor))
  message(paste("Overall error:", round(best_result$errors$overall, 2)))
  message(paste("Edge error:", round(best_result$errors$edge, 2)))
  message(paste("Core error:", round(best_result$errors$core, 2)))
  
  # Create plots
  plots <- createComparisonPlots(p1, p2, best_result$p1_transformed, 
                                  results_comparison, best_result)
  
  list(
    coords1_transformed = best_result$p1_transformed,
    best_edge_layer = best_result$edge_pct,
    best_adjustment = best_result$adj_factor,
    errors = best_result$errors,
    results_comparison = results_comparison,
    patchwork_plot = plots$combined,
    overlay_plot = plots$overlay,
    error_plot = plots$error_heatmap
  )
}
```



```{r}
result <- registerSpatialCoordinatesIterative(
  coords1 = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  coords2 = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  edge_layer_pcts = c(0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25, 0.3),
  adjustment_factors = c(0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 1.0),
  n_iterations = 10,  # More iterations = better overlap
  test_best = TRUE
)

# View results
result$patchwork_plot

# Save
ggsave("registration_iterative.png", result$patchwork_plot, 
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Check error metrics
print(result$errors)

# Access transformed coordinates
rna_aligned <- result$coords1_transformed
```





```{r}
createFinalPlots <- function(p1, p2, p1_transformed, errors, final_error) {
  
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  
  # Plot RNA FIRST (red), then ATAC (blue) on top, both with high transparency
  # This way both are visible through each other
  
  df_rna <- data.frame(x = p1_transformed[, 1], y = p1_transformed[, 2], type = "RNA")
  df_atac <- data.frame(x = p2[, 1], y = p2[, 2], type = "ATAC")
  df_overlay <- rbind(df_atac, df_rna)  # ATAC first, RNA on top (reversed)
  
  plot_overlay <- ggplot(df_overlay, aes(x = x, y = y, color = type)) +
    # Plot in reverse order: RNA first (larger size so visible), ATAC on top (smaller)
    geom_point(data = df_rna, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "#FF6B6B", size = 0.5, alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_point(data = df_atac, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "#3366FF", size = 0.6, alpha = 0.4) +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Non-linear Registration Result\n(Red: RNA, Blue: ATAC)",
         x = "X", y = "Y") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, 
             label = paste("Mean error:", round(final_error, 1)), 
             hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.5, size = 4, color = "red")
  
  # Convergence plot
  df_convergence <- data.frame(
    iteration = 1:length(errors),
    error = errors[1:length(errors)]
  )
  
  plot_convergence <- ggplot(df_convergence, aes(x = iteration, y = error)) +
    geom_line(color = "#FF6B6B", linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_point(color = "#FF6B6B", size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "green", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 2, label = "Target: 2%", 
             hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.5, color = "green", size = 3) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Convergence: Mean Distance per Iteration",
         x = "Iteration", y = "Mean Distance") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  
  # Distance distribution
  nn <- get.knnx(p2, p1_transformed, k = 1)
  dists <- sqrt(rowSums((p1_transformed - p2[nn$nn.index[, 1], ])^2))
  
  plot_dist <- ggplot(data.frame(distance = dists), aes(x = distance)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "#95E1D3", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean(dists)), color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_vline(aes(xintercept = quantile(dists, 0.9)), color = "orange", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = paste("Final Distance Distribution\nMean:", round(mean(dists), 1), 
                       "| 90th pct:", round(quantile(dists, 0.9), 1)),
         x = "Distance to Nearest ATAC", y = "Frequency") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5)
    )
  
  combined <- (plot_overlay / plot_convergence) | plot_dist +
    plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Non-linear Registration: Constrained Warping",
      subtitle = paste("Final mean error:", round(final_error, 1)),
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
                    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))
    )
  
  list(
    overlay = plot_overlay,
    convergence = plot_convergence,
    combined = combined
  )
}

registerSpatialCoordinatesSimple <- function(coords1, coords2, 
                                              n_iterations = 10,
                                              adjustment_strength = 0.1) {
  
  library(FNN)
  
  message("Simple iterative registration...")
  
  p1 <- as.matrix(coords1[, c("x", "y")])
  p2 <- as.matrix(coords2[, c("x", "y")])
  
  # Global initialization
  result_global <- computeGlobalTransform(p1, p2)
  p1_centered <- p1 - result_global$center1
  p1_scaled <- p1_centered * result_global$scale_factor
  p1_rotated <- p1_scaled %*% result_global$rotation
  p1_transformed <- sweep(p1_rotated, 2, result_global$center2, FUN = "+")
  
  errors <- numeric(n_iterations)
  
  for (iter in 1:n_iterations) {
    
    # Find nearest neighbors
    nn <- get.knnx(p2, p1_transformed, k = 1)
    dists <- sqrt(rowSums((p1_transformed - p2[nn$nn.index[, 1], ])^2))
    mean_error <- mean(dists)
    errors[iter] <- mean_error
    
    message(paste("Iteration", iter, "- Error:", round(mean_error, 2)))
    
    # Simple local adjustment: pull each RNA point toward its nearest ATAC neighbor
    target_pts <- p2[nn$nn.index[, 1], ]
    adjustment <- (target_pts - p1_transformed) * adjustment_strength
    
    p1_transformed <- p1_transformed + adjustment
    
    if (mean_error < 5) break
  }
  
  # Final metrics
  nn_final <- get.knnx(p2, p1_transformed, k = 1)
  dists_final <- sqrt(rowSums((p1_transformed - p2[nn_final$nn.index[, 1], ])^2))
  
  final_error <- mean(dists_final)
  
  message(paste("\nFinal error:", round(final_error, 2)))
  
  # Plots
  plots <- createFinalPlots(p1, p2, p1_transformed, errors, final_error)
  
  list(
    coords1_transformed = p1_transformed,
    mean_error = final_error,
    iteration_errors = errors,
    patchwork_plot = plots$combined,
    overlay_plot = plots$overlay
  )
}
```



# Pseudo-bulk RNA 

```{r Pseudo-Bulk RNA}
# --- Create Smoothed RNA Data (Pseudo-bulk simulation) and its graph ---
message("\n--- Creating Smoothed RNA Data for Pseudo-bulk Simulation ---")
smoothed_rna_list <- simulatePseudoBulkRNA(
  seurat_obj = seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed,
  rna_spatial_coords = rna_spatial_coords_filtered, # Use the filtered spatial coordinates
  sample_sizes = c(2, 3, 5, 10), # Default sample sizes from the function definition
  method = "mean" # Using mean aggregation
)

# Check if the requested simulation (S5) was successful
if (!"S5" %in% names(smoothed_rna_list) || ncol(smoothed_rna_list$S5) == 0 || nrow(smoothed_rna_list$S5) == 0) {
  stop("Simulation of Smoothed RNA data (S5) failed or resulted in an empty matrix. Check simulatePseudoBulkRNA function or input parameters.")
}

smoothed_rna_expression <- smoothed_rna_list$S5
message("Selected S5 smoothed RNA expression. Dimensions (genes x cells): ", paste(dim(smoothed_rna_expression), collapse="x"))

# Align metadata to the cells in smoothed_rna_expression
meta_for_smoothed_rna <- seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed@meta.data
meta_for_smoothed_rna <- meta_for_smoothed_rna[colnames(smoothed_rna_expression), , drop = FALSE]

# Create Seurat object from the smoothed expression matrix (ensure it's counts-like)
smoothed_counts <- as.matrix(smoothed_rna_expression) # genes x cells

smoothed_seurat_obj <- Seurat::CreateSeuratObject(counts = smoothed_counts, meta.data = meta_for_smoothed_rna)
# Basic Seurat preprocessing similar to original pipeline (Normalize, FindVariable, Scale, PCA)
DefaultAssay(smoothed_seurat_obj) <- "RNA"
smoothed_seurat_obj <- Seurat::NormalizeData(smoothed_seurat_obj, verbose = FALSE)
smoothed_seurat_obj <- Seurat::FindVariableFeatures(smoothed_seurat_obj, nfeatures = min(2000, nrow(smoothed_seurat_obj)), verbose = FALSE)
smoothed_seurat_obj <- Seurat::ScaleData(smoothed_seurat_obj, verbose = FALSE)
smoothed_seurat_obj <- Seurat::RunPCA(smoothed_seurat_obj, verbose = FALSE)

message("Seurat object created for Smoothed RNA data. Cells: ", ncol(smoothed_seurat_obj), ", Genes: ", nrow(smoothed_seurat_obj))
```


# Generate Separate RNA and ATAC Cell Graphs
```{r Generate Separate RNA and ATAC Cell Graphs}
# Define parameters for graph construction
graph_params <- list(
  rna_feature_dims = 1:30,
  rna_feature_k_neighbors = 20,
  atac_pca_dims = 30,       
  atac_k_neighbors = 20
)

# Generate separate RNA and ATAC graphs
separate_graphs <- generateSeparateModalGraphs(
  seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed = seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed,
  atac_counts_matrix_filtered = atac_counts_matrix_filtered,
  atac_peaks_gr_filtered = atac_peaks_gr_filtered,
  genome = "hg38",
  rna_feature_dims = graph_params$rna_feature_dims,
  rna_feature_k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors,
  atac_pca_dims = graph_params$atac_pca_dims,
  atac_k_neighbors = graph_params$atac_k_neighbors
)

rna_graph <- separate_graphs$rna_graph
atac_graph <- separate_graphs$atac_graph
atac_gene_activity_matrix_final <- separate_graphs$atac_gene_activity_matrix # Store for potential future use

message("RNA Graph dimensions: ", paste(dim(rna_graph), collapse = "x"))
message("ATAC Graph dimensions: ", paste(dim(atac_graph), collapse = "x"))


# --- Create cell-to-cell graph from the Smoothed RNA data ---
message("Creating cell-to-cell graph from Smoothed RNA data...")
# Ensure graph_params is defined and accessible; it should be defined before this chunk.
if (!exists("graph_params")) {
  stop("`graph_params` list is not defined. It's required for graph construction parameters.")
}
smoothed_rna_graph <- createRNACellGraph(
  seurat_obj = smoothed_seurat_obj,
  dims = graph_params$rna_feature_dims, # Use same dimensions as original RNA graph
  k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors # Use same k as original RNA graph
)

# Handle potential NULL or empty graph
if (is.null(smoothed_rna_graph) || Matrix::nnzero(smoothed_rna_graph) == 0) {
  warning("Smoothed RNA graph could not be created meaningfully. It will be represented as zeros.")
  # Get cell IDs from the smoothed Seurat object to create an empty graph of correct dimensions
  smoothed_rna_cell_ids <- colnames(smoothed_seurat_obj)
  smoothed_rna_graph <- Matrix::Matrix(0, nrow = length(smoothed_rna_cell_ids), ncol = length(smoothed_rna_cell_ids), sparse = TRUE, dimnames = list(smoothed_rna_cell_ids, smoothed_rna_cell_ids))
}

message("Smoothed RNA graph created. Dimensions: ", paste(dim(smoothed_rna_graph), collapse = "x"))
```

## save graphs
```{r Save graph}
# Create a list that includes all graphs and relevant data
all_graphs_and_data <- list(
  separate_graphs = separate_graphs, # Original RNA and ATAC graphs
  smoothed_rna_graph = smoothed_rna_graph, # The new smoothed RNA graph
  # Include other relevant data that might be needed later, e.g., preprocessed data objects
  seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed = seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed,
  rna_spatial_coords_filtered = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  atac_counts_matrix_filtered = atac_counts_matrix_filtered,
  atac_peaks_gr_filtered = atac_peaks_gr_filtered,
  atac_spatial_coords_filtered = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  atac_gene_activity_matrix_final = atac_gene_activity_matrix_final
)

# Save the combined object
file_path <- file.path(output_dir, "all_spatial_graphs_and_data.rds") # Updated filename for clarity
message("Saving all graphs and related data to: ", file_path)
saveRDS(all_graphs_and_data, file = file_path)
```


# Loading graph 
```{r Load Graph}
file_path <- file.path(output_philipp, "all_spatial_graphs_and_data.rds") # Updated filename for clarity

# Load Graph
all_graphs_and_data <- readRDS(file = file_path)
separate_graphs = all_graphs_and_data$separate_graphs
smoothed_rna_graph = all_graphs_and_data$smoothed_rna_graph
rna_graph <- separate_graphs$rna_graph
atac_graph <- separate_graphs$atac_graph
atac_gene_activity_matrix_final <- separate_graphs$atac_gene_activity_matrix
```


# Run CellWalker2 mapping between RNA labels and ATAC annotations
```{r Run CellWalker2 mapping between RNA labels and ATAC annotations}
# Uses atac_gene_activity_matrix_final (cells x genes from ATAC gene-activity) and rna_graph.
# Runs mapCellTypes using:
#   - label set 1: RNA-derived labels from computeTypeEdges (rna_label_edges)
#   - label set 2: ATAC-derived labels (motifs or simple peak clusters) computed below
#
# Produces tidy outputs: cellWalk2_res (mapCellTypes result), info_rna_to_atac (matrix), df_info (tidy)

# 1) Ensure RNA labels exist (cluster + markers)
message("Preparing RNA label edges (markers from Seurat clusters)...")
if (!"seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed@meta.data)) {
  # run clustering if missing
  seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed <- Seurat::FindNeighbors(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, dims = graph_params$rna_feature_dims)
  seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed <- Seurat::FindClusters(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, resolution = 0.5)
}
Idents(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed) <- "seurat_clusters"
markers_rna <- tryCatch({
  Seurat::FindAllMarkers(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, only.pos = TRUE, min.pct = 0.1, logfc.threshold = 0.25)
}, error = function(e) {
  warning("FindAllMarkers failed: ", e$message); NULL
})
if (is.null(markers_rna) || nrow(markers_rna) == 0) {
  # fallback simple markers: take top variable genes
  vgenes <- Seurat::VariableFeatures(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed)
  vgenes <- head(vgenes, 200)
  clusts <- unique(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed$seurat_clusters)
  # assign simple markers (first 10 genes per cluster) as mock markers
  mock_list <- lapply(seq_along(clusts), function(i) {
    data.frame(gene = head(vgenes, 10), cluster = as.character(clusts[i]), avg_log2FC = runif(10, 0.5, 1.5), stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
  })
  markers_rna_df <- do.call(rbind, mock_list)
} else {
  markers_rna_df <- as.data.frame(markers_rna)[, c("gene","cluster","avg_log2FC")]
}
# normalized expression for computeTypeEdges expects gene x cell scaled expression (expr_norm from processRNASeq)
# Use Seurat scaled data (log-normalized data) as exprNorm (genes x cells)
rna_expr_norm <- Seurat::GetAssayData(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")
# computeTypeEdges expects genes x cells with rownames genes and colnames cells
rna_label_edges <- changedCellWalkercomputeTypeEdges(rna_expr_norm, markers_rna_df)
message("RNA label edges: ", paste(dim(rna_label_edges), collapse = " x "))


# 2) Build / load ATAC labelEdges from atac_gene_activity_matrix_final (cells x genes)
if (!exists("atac_gene_activity_matrix_final"))
  stop("atac_gene_activity_matrix_final not found. Provide this matrix before running mapping.")

message("Preparing ATAC label edges from atac_gene_activity_matrix_final (no spatial).")

atac_label_edges_rds <- file.path(output_philipp, "atac_label_edges_3.rds")
atac_ga_for_graph_rds <- file.path(output_philipp, "atac_gene_activity_matrix_for_graph.rds")

# optional: cache filtered / reduced matrix for reuse in both labelEdges + graph
if (file.exists(atac_ga_for_graph_rds)) {
  atac_gene_activity_matrix_for_graph <- readRDS(atac_ga_for_graph_rds)
} else {
  # Use sparse-friendly variance calculation
  gene_var_atac <- sparseMatrixStats::colVars(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final)
  
  keep_genes_idx_atac <- which(gene_var_atac > 0)
  atac_gene_activity_matrix_for_graph <- atac_gene_activity_matrix_final[, keep_genes_idx_atac, drop = FALSE]
  
  saveRDS(atac_gene_activity_matrix_for_graph, atac_ga_for_graph_rds)
}

# Option A: motif-based labelEdges
if (file.exists(atac_label_edges_rds)) {
  message("Loading cached ATAC label edges from: ", atac_label_edges_rds)
  atac_label_edges <- readRDS(atac_label_edges_rds)
} else if (exists("motif_regions_df") && exists("atac_peaks_gr_filtered") && exists("atac_counts_matrix_filtered")) {
  message("Building ATAC label edges from motif_regions_df (peak overlaps)...")
  atac_label_edges <- createLabelEdgesFromRegions(
    motif_regions_df,
    atac_peaks_gr_filtered,
    atac_counts_matrix_filtered
  )
  saveRDS(atac_label_edges, atac_label_edges_rds)
  message("Saved ATAC label edges (motif-based) to: ", atac_label_edges_rds)
} else {
  # Option B: pseudo-clustering on reduced matrix with ROBUST parameters
  atac_label_edges <- buildAtacLabelEdgesFromGeneActivity(
    atac_gene_activity_matrix_for_graph,
    n_clusters = 30,           # Increased from 15
    min_cluster_size = 50,     # Merge small clusters
    n_init = 50,               # Try 50 different initializations
    min_weight = 0.05,         # Filter weak edges
    pca_dims = 30,             # Use 30 PCs
    balance_clusters = TRUE    # Prevent dominance (Option 2)
  )
  
  message("ATAC label edges (robust clustering): ",
          paste(dim(atac_label_edges), collapse = " x "))
  saveRDS(atac_label_edges, atac_label_edges_rds)
  message("Saved ATAC label edges (robust) to: ", atac_label_edges_rds)
}


# 3) Compute / load ATAC cell graph from filtered gene-activity matrix (cells x genes)
message("Computing ATAC cell graph from ATAC gene-activity matrix...")

atac_graph_rds <- file.path(output_philipp, "atac_graph_from_gene_activity_.rds")

if (file.exists(atac_graph_rds)) {
  message("Loading cached ATAC graph from: ", atac_graph_rds)
  atac_graph_res <- readRDS(atac_graph_rds)
} else {
  atac_graph_res <- tryCatch({
    createATACCellGraph(
      atac_gene_activity_matrix_for_graph,
      atac_pca_dims    = graph_params$atac_pca_dims,
      atac_k_neighbors = graph_params$atac_k_neighbors
    )
  }, error = function(e){
    warning("createATACCellGraph failed: ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
  saveRDS(atac_graph_res, atac_graph_rds)
  message("Saved ATAC graph result (graph+pca) to: ", atac_graph_rds)
}

if (is.list(atac_graph_res)) {
  atac_graph <- atac_graph_res$graph
} else if (is(atac_graph_res, "Matrix")) {
  atac_graph <- atac_graph_res
} else {
  atac_graph <- NULL
}
if (is.null(atac_graph)) warning("ATAC cell graph not available; mapping may use only RNA graph.")


# 4) Construct Direct Feature-Based Joint Graph (No Harmony)
message("Building direct kNN bridge between RNA and ATAC in shared feature space...")

library(FNN)
library(Matrix)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

# A. Translate ATAC Entrez IDs -> Gene Symbols (same as before)
entrez_ids <- colnames(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final)
id_map <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = entrez_ids, column = "SYMBOL", keytype = "ENTREZID", multiVals = "first")
valid_indices <- which(!is.na(id_map))
atac_ga_symbols <- atac_gene_activity_matrix_final[, valid_indices]
colnames(atac_ga_symbols) <- id_map[valid_indices]

# B. Extract shared feature space
atac_mtx <- t(atac_ga_symbols)  # genes x cells
common_features <- intersect(rownames(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed), rownames(atac_mtx))
message("Common features for bridge: ", length(common_features))

if (length(common_features) < 10) {
  stop("Too few common features (", length(common_features), ") to build meaningful bridge.")
}

# C. Normalize both modalities in shared space
rna_subset <- Seurat::GetAssayData(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")[common_features, ]
atac_subset <- atac_mtx[common_features, ]

# Simple depth normalization for ATAC (to match RNA's log-normalization scale)
atac_subset_norm <- sweep(atac_subset, 2, colSums(atac_subset), "/") * median(colSums(rna_subset))
atac_subset_norm <- log1p(atac_subset_norm)

# D. Scale both to z-scores for fair comparison
rna_subset_scaled <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(rna_subset))))
atac_subset_scaled <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(atac_subset_norm))))

# Replace NaN (from zero-variance genes) with 0
rna_subset_scaled[is.na(rna_subset_scaled)] <- 0
atac_subset_scaled[is.na(atac_subset_scaled)] <- 0

# E. Build cross-modality kNN bridge
k_bridge <- 100  # Number of cross-modality neighbors

message("Finding RNA -> ATAC nearest neighbors (k=", k_bridge, ")...")
rna_to_atac_nn <- get.knnx(
  data = t(atac_subset_scaled),   # ATAC cells as reference
  query = t(rna_subset_scaled),   # RNA cells as query
  k = k_bridge
)

message("Finding ATAC -> RNA nearest neighbors (k=", k_bridge, ")...")
atac_to_rna_nn <- get.knnx(
  data = t(rna_subset_scaled),    # RNA cells as reference
  query = t(atac_subset_scaled),  # ATAC cells as query
  k = k_bridge
)

# F. Convert to similarity scores (inverse distance with Gaussian kernel)
compute_similarity <- function(distances) {
  sigma <- median(distances, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (sigma <= 0) sigma <- 1
  pmin(1, exp(- (distances^2) / (2 * sigma^2)))
}

rna_to_atac_sim <- compute_similarity(rna_to_atac_nn$nn.dist)
atac_to_rna_sim <- compute_similarity(atac_to_rna_nn$nn.dist)

# G. Build joint graph combining within-modality + cross-modality edges
rna_cell_ids <- colnames(rna_subset)
atac_cell_ids <- colnames(atac_subset)
all_cell_ids <- c(rna_cell_ids, atac_cell_ids)
n_rna <- length(rna_cell_ids)
n_atac <- length(atac_cell_ids)
n_total <- n_rna + n_atac

# Initialize sparse joint graph
joint_graph_triplets <- list()

# 1. RNA within-modality graph (from your separate_graphs$rna_graph)
if (!is.null(rna_graph) && nrow(rna_graph) > 0) {
  rna_graph_aligned <- rna_graph[rna_cell_ids, rna_cell_ids]
  rna_triplets <- summary(rna_graph_aligned)
  joint_graph_triplets$rna_internal <- data.frame(
    i = rna_triplets$i,
    j = rna_triplets$j,
    x = rna_triplets$x * 1.0  # weight = 1.0 for within-modality
  )
}

# 2. ATAC within-modality graph (from your separate_graphs$atac_graph)
if (!is.null(atac_graph) && nrow(atac_graph) > 0) {
  atac_graph_aligned <- atac_graph[atac_cell_ids, atac_cell_ids]
  atac_triplets <- summary(atac_graph_aligned)
  joint_graph_triplets$atac_internal <- data.frame(
    i = atac_triplets$i + n_rna,  # offset by RNA cells
    j = atac_triplets$j + n_rna,
    x = atac_triplets$x * 1.0
  )
}

# 3. RNA -> ATAC bridge edges
rna_to_atac_i <- rep(1:n_rna, each = k_bridge)
rna_to_atac_j <- as.vector(rna_to_atac_nn$nn.index) + n_rna  # offset to ATAC block
rna_to_atac_x <- as.vector(rna_to_atac_sim) * 0.3  # downweight cross-modality edges

valid_bridge_1 <- rna_to_atac_j > n_rna & rna_to_atac_j <= n_total & rna_to_atac_x > 0
joint_graph_triplets$rna_to_atac <- data.frame(
  i = rna_to_atac_i[valid_bridge_1],
  j = rna_to_atac_j[valid_bridge_1],
  x = rna_to_atac_x[valid_bridge_1]
)

# 4. ATAC -> RNA bridge edges
atac_to_rna_i <- rep((n_rna + 1):n_total, each = k_bridge)
atac_to_rna_j <- as.vector(atac_to_rna_nn$nn.index)  # maps to RNA cells
atac_to_rna_x <- as.vector(atac_to_rna_sim) * 0.3

valid_bridge_2 <- atac_to_rna_j > 0 & atac_to_rna_j <= n_rna & atac_to_rna_x > 0
joint_graph_triplets$atac_to_rna <- data.frame(
  i = atac_to_rna_i[valid_bridge_2],
  j = atac_to_rna_j[valid_bridge_2],
  x = atac_to_rna_x[valid_bridge_2]
)

# Combine all triplets
all_triplets <- do.call(rbind, joint_graph_triplets)

# Symmetrize (take max of i->j and j->i)
all_triplets_sym <- rbind(
  all_triplets,
  data.frame(i = all_triplets$j, j = all_triplets$i, x = all_triplets$x)
)

library(data.table)
setDT(all_triplets_sym)
all_triplets_sym <- all_triplets_sym[, .(x = max(x)), by = .(i, j)]

# Build final sparse matrix
joint_graph <- sparseMatrix(
  i = all_triplets_sym$i,
  j = all_triplets_sym$j,
  x = all_triplets_sym$x,
  dims = c(n_total, n_total),
  dimnames = list(all_cell_ids, all_cell_ids)
)

# Ensure diagonal = 1
diag(joint_graph) <- 1

message("Joint graph constructed: ", n_total, " cells (", n_rna, " RNA + ", n_atac, " ATAC)")
message("  Within-RNA edges: ", if(!is.null(joint_graph_triplets$rna_internal)) nrow(joint_graph_triplets$rna_internal) else 0)
message("  Within-ATAC edges: ", if(!is.null(joint_graph_triplets$atac_internal)) nrow(joint_graph_triplets$atac_internal) else 0)
message("  RNA->ATAC bridge edges: ", nrow(joint_graph_triplets$rna_to_atac))
message("  ATAC->RNA bridge edges: ", nrow(joint_graph_triplets$atac_to_rna))

# Register for mapping
run_with_graphs <- list(joint_bridge = joint_graph)

# H. Diagnostic Spectral Embedding (Fast, Works on Sparse Graphs)
library(RSpectra)
message("Computing spectral embedding for graph visualization...")

# Compute Laplacian
D <- Matrix::Diagonal(x = 1 / sqrt(Matrix::rowSums(joint_graph)))
L_norm <- D %*% joint_graph %*% D

# Compute top eigenvectors (like spectral clustering/PCA on graph)
eigen_res <- RSpectra::eigs_sym(L_norm, k = 2, which = "LM")
spectral_coords <- eigen_res$vectors

plot_df <- data.frame(
  Dim1 = spectral_coords[,1],
  Dim2 = spectral_coords[,2],
  modality = c(rep("RNA", n_rna), rep("ATAC", n_atac)),
  cell_id = all_cell_ids
)

p_spectral <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Dim1, y = Dim2, color = modality)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("RNA" = "#E41A1C", "ATAC" = "#377EB8")) +
  ggtitle("Joint Graph: Spectral Embedding") +
  labs(x = "Spectral Dimension 1", y = "Spectral Dimension 2")

print(p_spectral)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "joint_graph_spectral_diagnostic_2.png"), 
       p_spectral, width = 8, height = 7)


library(RSpectra)
library(uwot)

# Compute more spectral dimensions (like PCA components)
message("Computing spectral embedding for UMAP input...")

D <- Matrix::Diagonal(x = 1 / sqrt(Matrix::rowSums(joint_graph)))
L_norm <- D %*% joint_graph %*% D

# Get more dimensions (e.g., 30-50, like PCA)
n_dims <- 30
eigen_res <- RSpectra::eigs_sym(L_norm, k = n_dims, which = "LM")
spectral_embedding <- eigen_res$vectors

# Run UMAP on spectral coordinates
umap_coords <- umap(
  spectral_embedding, 
  n_neighbors = 30, 
  min_dist = 0.3,
  metric = "euclidean"
)

# Create plot dataframe
plot_df <- data.frame(
  UMAP1 = umap_coords[,1],
  UMAP2 = umap_coords[,2],
  modality = c(rep("RNA", n_rna), rep("ATAC", n_atac)),
  cell_id = all_cell_ids
)

# Plot
library(ggplot2)
p_umap <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = modality)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("RNA" = "#E41A1C", "ATAC" = "#377EB8")) +
  ggtitle("Joint Graph UMAP: Are RNA and ATAC cells mixed?") +
  labs(subtitle = paste0("Based on ", length(common_features), " shared features"))

print(p_umap)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "joint_graph_umap.png"), 
       p_umap, width = 8, height = 7)



```


## saving spectral plot data 

```{r}
spectral.data =  p_spectral@data

atac_df <- spectral.data[spectral.data$modality == "ATAC", ]
rna_df  <- spectral.data[spectral.data$modality == "RNA", ]

radius <- 0.0001 # set as neighborhood size
radius <- as.numeric(radius)

library(RANN)

# ATAC as reference, RNA as query
neighbors <- RANN::nn2(
  data = atac_df[, c("Dim1", "Dim2")],
  query = rna_df[, c("Dim1", "Dim2")],
  searchtype = "radius", radius = radius
)

# Get all (rna_idx, atac_idx) pairs within radius
neighbor_pairs <- which(neighbors$nn.idx > 0, arr.ind = TRUE)
overlaps <- data.frame(
  rna_idx = neighbor_pairs[, 1],
  atac_idx = neighbors$nn.idx[neighbor_pairs],
  rna_cell_id = rna_df$cell_id[neighbor_pairs[, 1]],
  atac_cell_id = atac_df$cell_id[neighbors$nn.idx[neighbor_pairs]]
)

# Assume overlaps is your result from earlier steps, with indices for plot_df
# For example, if you want the RNA side:
overlap_points <- rbind(
  atac_df[unique(overlaps$atac_idx), c("Dim1", "Dim2", "modality")],
  rna_df[unique(overlaps$rna_idx), c("Dim1", "Dim2", "modality")]
)


library(ggplot2)

p_spectral2 <- ggplot(spectral.data, aes(x = Dim1, y = Dim2, color = modality)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("RNA" = "#E41A1C", "ATAC" = "#377EB8")) +
  geom_point(data = overlap_points, 
             aes(x = Dim1, y = Dim2), 
             color = "gold",
             size = 1.5,
             shape = 21,
             stroke = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Joint Graph: Spectral Embedding (with Overlaps Highlighted)") +
  labs(x = "Spectral Dimension 1", y = "Spectral Dimension 2")

print(p_spectral2)

write.csv(overlap_points, file.path(output_dir, 'spectral_graph_common.csv'))


atac_overlap_points <- data.frame(
  cell_id = overlaps$atac_cell_id,
  Dim1 = atac_df$Dim1[overlaps$atac_idx],
  Dim2 = atac_df$Dim2[overlaps$atac_idx],
  modality = "ATAC"
)

atac_overlap_points2 = atac_spatial_coords_filtered[atac_overlap_points$cell_id, ]

# Visualizing this spatially 
ggplot(atac_spatial_coords_filtered, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.6) +
  theme_minimal() +
  # scale_color_manual(values = c("RNA" = "#E41A1C", "ATAC" = "#377EB8")) +
  geom_point(data = atac_overlap_points2, 
             aes(x = x, y = y), 
             color = "gold",
             size = 1.5,
             shape = 21,
             stroke = 0.8) +
  ggtitle("Joint Graph: Spectral Embedding (with Overlaps Highlighted)") +
  labs(x = "Spectral Dimension 1", y = "Spectral Dimension 2")


```




```{r}
# 5) Run mapCellTypes for each chosen graph (Joint or Modality-Specific)
map_results_rds <- file.path(output_philipp, "cellwalker2_map_results_list_joint_subset5k_5.rds")

source("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/adjusted_mapCellTypes_functions.R")

if (file.exists(map_results_rds)) {
  message("Loading cached mapCellTypes results from: ", map_results_rds)
  map_results_list <- readRDS(map_results_rds)
} else {
  map_results_list <- list()

  # Helper to make label matrices match the joint graph dimensions
  expand_labels_to_graph <- function(le_mat, graph_names) {
    new_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(graph_names), ncol = ncol(le_mat))
    rownames(new_mat) <- graph_names
    colnames(new_mat) <- colnames(le_mat)
    
    # Only fill rows where the barcode exists in the label matrix
    common_cells <- intersect(graph_names, rownames(le_mat))
    new_mat[common_cells, ] <- le_mat[common_cells, ]
    return(new_mat)
  }
  
  # Sync labels to the full joint graph names
  full_rna_le  <- expand_labels_to_graph(rna_label_edges, rownames(joint_graph))
  full_atac_le <- expand_labels_to_graph(atac_label_edges, rownames(joint_graph))
  
  # Prepare the final list for the mapping loop
  labelEdgesList_for_map <- list(RNA = full_rna_le, ATAC = full_atac_le)
  
  for (graph_name in names(run_with_graphs)) {
    cg_full <- run_with_graphs[[graph_name]]
    message("Processing graph: ", graph_name, " (N=", nrow(cg_full), ")")

    # 1. Prepare subset and modality groups
    subset_obj <- subset_joint_cells_for_mapping(
      cg      = cg_full,
      rna_le  = rna_label_edges, 
      atac_le = atac_label_edges,
      max_cells = 5000L
    )
    
    cg      <- subset_obj$graph
    rna_le  <- subset_obj$rna_le
    atac_le <- subset_obj$atac_le
    mod_grp <- subset_obj$groups

    # 2. Assemble and Clean Label List
    # Ensure matrices are standard matrices (not sparse) for the rowSums check
    rna_le_mat  <- as.matrix(rna_le)
    atac_le_mat <- if(!is.null(atac_le)) as.matrix(atac_le) else NULL
    
    labelEdgesList_for_map <- list(RNA = rna_le_mat)
    if (!is.null(atac_le_mat)) labelEdgesList_for_map$ATAC <- atac_le_mat
    
    # 3. Define groupsList with high-precision zero-checking
    # We must ensure that any cell with NO connections (rowSum == 0) is group 0
    # and that cells only belong to their respective modality group.
    groupsList_for_map <- list(
      RNA = ifelse(subset_obj$groups == 1 & rowSums(rna_le_mat) > 1e-10, 1, 0)
    )
    
    if (!is.null(atac_le_mat)) {
      groupsList_for_map$ATAC <- ifelse(subset_obj$groups == 2 & rowSums(atac_le_mat) > 1e-10, 2, 0)
    }


    # 4. Run mapCellTypes
    library(future)
    plan(multisession, workers = 8) 

    message("  Calling mapCellTypes (joint mapping) ...")
    cellWalk2_res <- mapCellTypes_(
      cellGraph        = cg,
      labelEdgesList   = labelEdgesList_for_map,
      labelEdgeWeights = c(1, 1), # Equal weight to both modalities
      compute.Zscore   = TRUE,
      nround           = 100,
      batch_size       = 20,           # rounds per batch
      conv_threshold   = 0.01,         # convergence sensitivity
      conv_window      = 20,           # window size
      groupsList       = groupsList_for_map,
      sampleDepth      = 10000,
      parallel         = TRUE
    )

    map_results_list[[graph_name]] <- list(
      cellGraphName   = graph_name,
      result          = cellWalk2_res,
      used_label_sets = labelEdgesList_for_map,
      subset_cell_ids = subset_obj$cell_ids,
      modality_groups = mod_grp
    )
  }
  saveRDS(map_results_list, file = map_results_rds)
}

# 6) Tidy outputs (Updated to look for specific RNA -> ATAC mapping)
summary_map <- function(cellWalk2_obj, labelEdgesList) {
  inf_list <- cellWalk2_obj$infMat
  z_list   <- cellWalk2_obj$zscore
  
  if (length(inf_list) == 0) {
    warning("Influence Matrix is empty.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # 1. Identify which list element is RNA -> ATAC
  # We look for the matrix where rows match RNA labels and cols match ATAC labels
  rna_labs  <- colnames(labelEdgesList$RNA)
  atac_labs <- colnames(labelEdgesList$ATAC)
  
  target_idx <- NULL
  for (i in seq_along(inf_list)) {
    # We check if the rownames of the matrix exist in our RNA label set
    if (any(rownames(inf_list[[i]]) %in% rna_labs) && 
        any(colnames(inf_list[[i]]) %in% atac_labs)) {
      target_idx <- i
      break
    }
  }
  
  # Fallback if logic fails: just take the first one but avoid NA
  if (is.null(target_idx)) {
    message("Notice: Could not automatically match label names, using first available mapping.")
    target_idx <- 1
  }

  # 2. Extract the data safely using single brackets if numeric or double if guaranteed
  out <- list(
    labelEdgeWeights = cellWalk2_obj$labelEdgeWeights,
    info_1_to_2      = inf_list[[target_idx]],
    z_1_to_2         = if(!is.null(z_list)) z_list[[target_idx]] else NULL
  )
  
  # 3. Create tidy dataframe
  df_info <- as.data.frame(as.table(as.matrix(out$info_1_to_2)))
  colnames(df_info) <- c("label_rna", "label_atac", "influence")
  
  if (!is.null(out$z_1_to_2)) {
    df_z <- as.data.frame(as.table(as.matrix(out$z_1_to_2)))
    colnames(df_z) <- c("label_rna", "label_atac", "zscore")
    out$df_info_z <- merge(df_info, df_z, by = c("label_rna", "label_atac"))
  } else {
    out$df_info_z <- df_info
  }
  
  return(out)
}

# Run summary on the joint run specifically
chosen_run <- "joint_bridge"
if (chosen_run %in% names(map_results_list)) {
  cw2obj <- map_results_list[[chosen_run]]$result
  cw2_summary <- summary_map(cw2obj, map_results_list[[chosen_run]]$used_label_sets)
}


# 7) Quick plotting helper for the chosen result
plotInfluenceHeatmap <- function(info_mat, top_n = 25, main = "") {
  if (is.null(info_mat)) stop("info_mat is NULL")
  rowmax <- apply(info_mat, 1, max, na.rm = TRUE)
  colmax <- apply(info_mat, 2, max, na.rm = TRUE)
  rr <- head(order(-rowmax), top_n)
  cc <- head(order(-colmax), top_n)
  subm <- info_mat[rr, cc, drop = FALSE]
  library(reshape2)
  dfm <- reshape2::melt(as.matrix(subm))
  colnames(dfm) <- c("row","col","value")
  dfm$row <- factor(dfm$row, levels = rev(rownames(subm)))
  dfm$col <- factor(dfm$col, levels = colnames(subm))
  p <- ggplot(dfm, aes(x = col, y = row, fill = value)) + geom_tile() + scale_fill_viridis_c() + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1), axis.title = element_blank()) + ggtitle(main)
  return(p)
}

if (!is.null(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2)) {
  print(head(cw2_summary$df_info_z, 20))
  p_inf <- plotInfluenceHeatmap(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2, top_n = min(40, nrow(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2)), main = paste0("Influence: set1 -> set2 (", chosen_run, ")"))
  print(p_inf)
}
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_map_results_Heatmap_4.png"), p_inf)

# Save the map results for later inspection
saveRDS(map_results_list, file = file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_map_results_list_3.rds"))
```




# Validating CellWalker mapping
```{r Validating CellWalker mapping}

# ============================================================================
# 1. Z-score Heatmap
# ============================================================================
zscore_matrix <- cw2_summary$z_1_to_2
rownames(zscore_matrix) <- paste0("RNA_", rownames(zscore_matrix))

ph_map <- pheatmap(
  zscore_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "yellow", "red", "darkred"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max(zscore_matrix, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 101),
  main = "RNA → ATAC Mapping (Z-scores)",
  fontsize = 10,
  angle_col = 45
)

print(ph_map)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_zscore_pheatmap.png"), ph_map)


# ============================================================================
# 2. Top Mappings Analysis
# ============================================================================
top_mappings <- cw2_summary$df_info_z %>%
  filter(zscore > 3) %>%
  arrange(desc(zscore)) %>%
  head(20)

print("Top 20 RNA → ATAC Mappings (Z-score > 3):")
print(top_mappings)

# Save top mappings to file
write.csv(top_mappings, 
          file = file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_top_mappings.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)


# ============================================================================
# 3. Spatial Co-localization Check
# ============================================================================
message("Analyzing spatial co-localization for top mappings...")

# Extract ATAC cluster assignments from label edges
# atac_label_edges has cells as rows, cluster labels as columns
atac_cluster_assignments <- apply(atac_label_edges, 1, which.max)
names(atac_cluster_assignments) <- rownames(atac_label_edges)
atac_cluster_names <- colnames(atac_label_edges)[atac_cluster_assignments]
names(atac_cluster_names) <- names(atac_cluster_assignments)

# For the top mapping, create spatial overlay plot
if (nrow(top_mappings) > 0) {
  # Get the strongest mapping
  top_rna_cluster <- as.character(top_mappings$label_rna[1])
  top_atac_cluster <- as.character(top_mappings$label_atac[1])
  
  # Get cells for these clusters
  rna_cluster_cells <- names(which(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed$seurat_clusters == top_rna_cluster))
  atac_cluster_cells <- names(which(atac_cluster_names == top_atac_cluster))
  
  # Filter to cells present in spatial coordinates
  rna_cluster_cells <- intersect(rna_cluster_cells, rownames(rna_spatial_coords_filtered))
  atac_cluster_cells <- intersect(atac_cluster_cells, rownames(atac_spatial_coords_filtered))
  
  if (length(rna_cluster_cells) > 0 && length(atac_cluster_cells) > 0) {
    # Create combined dataframe
    plot_df <- data.frame(
      x = c(rna_spatial_coords_filtered[rna_cluster_cells, "x"], 
            atac_spatial_coords_filtered[atac_cluster_cells, "x"]),
      y = c(rna_spatial_coords_filtered[rna_cluster_cells, "y"], 
            atac_spatial_coords_filtered[atac_cluster_cells, "y"]),
      modality = c(rep(paste0("RNA_cluster_", top_rna_cluster), length(rna_cluster_cells)),
                   rep(paste0("ATAC_cluster_", top_atac_cluster), length(atac_cluster_cells)))
    )
    
    # Create named color vector first
    color_values <- c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8")
    names(color_values) <- c(
      paste0("RNA_cluster_", top_rna_cluster),
      paste0("ATAC_cluster_", top_atac_cluster)
    )
    
    p_spatial <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = modality)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
      scale_color_manual(values = color_values) +
      theme_minimal() +
      ggtitle(paste0("Spatial Co-localization: RNA Cluster ", top_rna_cluster, 
                     " vs ATAC Cluster ", top_atac_cluster,
                     "\nZ-score = ", round(top_mappings$zscore[1], 2)))
    
    print(p_spatial)
    ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_spatial_colocalization_top.png"), 
           p_spatial, width = 8, height = 7)
  } else {
    message("Not enough cells found for spatial co-localization plot")
  }
}


# ============================================================================
# 4. RNA Cluster Marker Analysis
# ============================================================================
message("Analyzing marker genes for top mapped RNA clusters...")

# For top 3 mappings, identify marker genes
top_n_mappings <- min(3, nrow(top_mappings))
rna_marker_summary <- list()

for (i in 1:top_n_mappings) {
  rna_clust <- as.character(top_mappings$label_rna[i])
  
  rna_cluster_markers <- markers_rna_df %>%
    filter(cluster == rna_clust) %>%
    arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  rna_marker_summary[[rna_clust]] <- rna_cluster_markers
  
  message("\nRNA Cluster ", rna_clust, " top markers:")
  print(rna_cluster_markers[, c("gene", "avg_log2FC")])
}


# ============================================================================
# 5. ATAC Peak Activity Analysis
# ============================================================================
message("Analyzing ATAC peak activity for top mapped clusters...")

atac_peak_summary <- list()

for (i in 1:top_n_mappings) {
  atac_clust <- as.character(top_mappings$label_atac[i])
  atac_cluster_cells <- names(which(atac_cluster_names == atac_clust))
  atac_cluster_cells <- intersect(atac_cluster_cells, rownames(atac_counts_matrix_filtered))
  
  if (length(atac_cluster_cells) > 5) {
    # Calculate mean peak activity
    atac_cluster_peak_activity <- Matrix::colMeans(
      atac_counts_matrix_filtered[atac_cluster_cells, ]
    )
    
    # Get top peaks
    top_peaks_idx <- head(order(atac_cluster_peak_activity, decreasing = TRUE), 20)
    top_peaks <- names(atac_peaks_gr_filtered)[top_peaks_idx]
    
    # Convert to genomic coordinates
    top_peaks_gr <- atac_peaks_gr_filtered[top_peaks_idx]
    
    atac_peak_summary[[atac_clust]] <- list(
      top_peaks = top_peaks,
      top_peaks_gr = top_peaks_gr,
      mean_activity = atac_cluster_peak_activity[top_peaks_idx]
    )
    
    message("\nATAC Cluster ", atac_clust, " - Top 5 peaks:")
    print(head(top_peaks_gr, 5))
  }
}


# ============================================================================
# 6. Gene Activity Correlation Analysis
# ============================================================================
message("Computing RNA-ATAC gene activity correlations...")

# Get shared genes between RNA and ATAC
shared_genes <- intersect(
  rownames(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed),
  colnames(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final)
)
message("Number of shared genes: ", length(shared_genes))

# For each top mapping, compute correlation
correlation_results <- list()

for (i in 1:top_n_mappings) {
  rna_clust <- as.character(top_mappings$label_rna[i])
  atac_clust <- as.character(top_mappings$label_atac[i])
  
  # Get cells
  rna_cluster_cells <- names(which(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed$seurat_clusters == rna_clust))
  atac_cluster_cells <- names(which(atac_cluster_names == atac_clust))
  
  # Filter to cells present in data
  rna_cluster_cells <- intersect(rna_cluster_cells, colnames(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed))
  atac_cluster_cells <- intersect(atac_cluster_cells, rownames(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final))
  
  if (length(rna_cluster_cells) > 5 && length(atac_cluster_cells) > 5) {
    # Extract expression and activity
    rna_expr <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, layer = "data")[shared_genes, rna_cluster_cells]
    atac_activity <- atac_gene_activity_matrix_final[atac_cluster_cells, shared_genes]
    
    # Compute mean across cells for each gene
    rna_mean <- Matrix::rowMeans(rna_expr)
    atac_mean <- Matrix::colMeans(atac_activity)
    
    # Filter genes with sufficient expression
    expressed_genes <- shared_genes[rna_mean > 0.1 & atac_mean > 0.1]
    
    if (length(expressed_genes) > 10) {
      # Compute correlation
      gene_correlations <- sapply(expressed_genes, function(g) {
        rna_vals <- as.numeric(rna_expr[g, ])
        atac_vals <- as.numeric(atac_activity[, g])
        
        if (sd(rna_vals) > 0 && sd(atac_vals) > 0) {
          cor(rna_vals, atac_vals, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
        } else {
          NA
        }
      })
      
      gene_correlations <- gene_correlations[!is.na(gene_correlations)]
      
      correlation_results[[paste0("RNA", rna_clust, "_ATAC", atac_clust)]] <- gene_correlations
      
      message("\nRNA Cluster ", rna_clust, " → ATAC Cluster ", atac_clust)
      message("  Genes analyzed: ", length(gene_correlations))
      message("  Median correlation: ", round(median(gene_correlations), 3))
      message("  Mean correlation: ", round(mean(gene_correlations), 3))
      
      # Plot histogram
      p_cor <- ggplot(data.frame(cor = gene_correlations), aes(x = cor)) +
        geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "skyblue", color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = median(gene_correlations), 
                   linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 1) +
        labs(title = paste0("RNA Cluster ", rna_clust, " → ATAC Cluster ", atac_clust,
                           "\nGene Activity Correlation (n=", length(gene_correlations), ")"),
             x = "Spearman Correlation", y = "Count") +
        theme_minimal()
      
      print(p_cor)
      ggsave(file.path(output_dir, 
                      paste0("cellwalker2_gene_correlation_RNA", rna_clust, 
                             "_ATAC", atac_clust, ".png")), 
             p_cor, width = 7, height = 5)
    }
  }
}


# ============================================================================
# 7. Dotplot Visualization
# ============================================================================
plotZscoreDotplot <- function(zscore_matrix, threshold = 3) {
  zscore_df <- reshape2::melt(zscore_matrix)
  colnames(zscore_df) <- c("RNA_label", "ATAC_label", "zscore")
  
  # Filter by threshold
  zscore_df <- zscore_df %>% filter(zscore > threshold)
  
  if (nrow(zscore_df) == 0) {
    message("No mappings above threshold ", threshold)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(zscore_df, aes(x = ATAC_label, y = RNA_label, 
                        size = zscore, color = zscore)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 10)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
    labs(title = "RNA → ATAC Cell Type Mapping",
         x = "ATAC Cluster", y = "RNA Cluster",
         size = "Z-score", color = "Z-score")
  
  return(p)
}

p_dotplot <- plotZscoreDotplot(zscore_matrix, threshold = 3)
if (!is.null(p_dotplot)) {
  print(p_dotplot)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_zscore_dotplot.png"), 
         p_dotplot, width = 10, height = 8)
}


# ============================================================================
# 8. Transfer Labels to ATAC cells
# ============================================================================
message("Transferring RNA labels to ATAC cells...")

# Get influence matrix (RNA clusters -> ATAC cells in the subset)
influence_mat <- cw2_summary$info_1_to_2

# For each ATAC cell in the mapping, assign best RNA label
atac_predicted_labels <- apply(influence_mat, 2, which.max)
atac_predicted_labels <- rownames(influence_mat)[atac_predicted_labels]
names(atac_predicted_labels) <- colnames(influence_mat)

# Get confidence scores
atac_confidence <- apply(influence_mat, 2, max)

# Create metadata df for all ATAC cells
atac_meta_with_labels <- data.frame(
  cell_id = rownames(atac_counts_matrix_filtered),
  predicted_rna_label = NA,
  confidence = 0,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
rownames(atac_meta_with_labels) <- atac_meta_with_labels$cell_id

# Fill in predictions for cells that were in the mapping
mapped_cells <- intersect(names(atac_predicted_labels), atac_meta_with_labels$cell_id)
atac_meta_with_labels[mapped_cells, "predicted_rna_label"] <- atac_predicted_labels[mapped_cells]
atac_meta_with_labels[mapped_cells, "confidence"] <- atac_confidence[mapped_cells]

# Summary
message("Label transfer summary:")
message("  Total ATAC cells: ", nrow(atac_meta_with_labels))
message("  Cells with predictions: ", sum(!is.na(atac_meta_with_labels$predicted_rna_label)))
message("  Mean confidence: ", round(mean(atac_meta_with_labels$confidence[!is.na(atac_meta_with_labels$predicted_rna_label)]), 3))

# Save predictions
write.csv(atac_meta_with_labels, 
          file = file.path(output_dir, "atac_predicted_rna_labels.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)


# ============================================================================
# 9. Spatial visualization of transferred labels
# ============================================================================
message("Creating spatial visualization of transferred labels...")

# Add spatial coordinates
atac_meta_spatial <- atac_meta_with_labels
atac_meta_spatial$x <- atac_spatial_coords_filtered[atac_meta_spatial$cell_id, "x"]
atac_meta_spatial$y <- atac_spatial_coords_filtered[atac_meta_spatial$cell_id, "y"]

# Filter to cells with predictions
atac_meta_spatial_pred <- atac_meta_spatial[!is.na(atac_meta_spatial$predicted_rna_label), ]

if (nrow(atac_meta_spatial_pred) > 0) {
  # Plot transferred labels in space
  p_spatial_transfer <- ggplot(atac_meta_spatial_pred, 
                               aes(x = x, y = y, color = predicted_rna_label)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set3", name = "RNA Label") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "ATAC Cells Colored by Transferred RNA Label",
         subtitle = paste0(nrow(atac_meta_spatial_pred), " cells with predictions"))
  
  print(p_spatial_transfer)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_transferred_labels_spatial.png"),
         p_spatial_transfer, width = 10, height = 8)
  
  # Plot confidence in space
  p_confidence <- ggplot(atac_meta_spatial_pred, 
                        aes(x = x, y = y, color = confidence)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "Confidence") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "ATAC Label Transfer Confidence",
         subtitle = "Higher values = more confident predictions")
  
  print(p_confidence)
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "cellwalker2_confidence_spatial.png"),
         p_confidence, width = 10, height = 8)
}


# ============================================================================
# 10. Summary Report
# ============================================================================
message("\n========== CellWalker2 Mapping Validation Summary ==========")
message("1. Top Mappings:")
message("   - ", nrow(top_mappings), " significant mappings (Z > 3)")
message("   - Strongest: RNA Cluster ", top_mappings$label_rna[1], 
        " → ATAC Cluster ", top_mappings$label_atac[1], 
        " (Z = ", round(top_mappings$zscore[1], 2), ")")

message("\n2. Gene Activity Correlations:")
for (mapping_name in names(correlation_results)) {
  cors <- correlation_results[[mapping_name]]
  message("   ", mapping_name, ": median r = ", round(median(cors), 3),
          " (", length(cors), " genes)")
}

message("\n3. Label Transfer:")
message("   - Transferred labels to ", 
        sum(!is.na(atac_meta_with_labels$predicted_rna_label)), " ATAC cells")
message("   - Mean confidence: ", 
        round(mean(atac_meta_with_labels$confidence[!is.na(atac_meta_with_labels$predicted_rna_label)]), 3))

message("\n4. Output Files:")
message("   - Z-score heatmap: cellwalker2_zscore_pheatmap.png")
message("   - Dotplot: cellwalker2_zscore_dotplot.png")
message("   - Top mappings: cellwalker2_top_mappings.csv")
message("   - Transferred labels: atac_predicted_rna_labels.csv")
message("   - Gene correlation plots: cellwalker2_gene_correlation_*.png")
message("   - Spatial plots: cellwalker2_spatial_*.png")
message("============================================================\n")
```

# Investigate ATAC Cluster Dominance
```{r Investigate ATAC Cluster Dominance - FIXED}

message("\n========== INVESTIGATING ATAC CLUSTER DOMINANCE ==========\n")

# ============================================================================
# DIAGNOSTIC: Check actual cluster distribution
# ============================================================================
message("CRITICAL CHECK: How many unique ATAC clusters exist?")
unique_clusters <- unique(atac_cluster_names)
message("Unique clusters: ", paste(unique_clusters, collapse = ", "))
message("Number of unique clusters: ", length(unique_clusters))

if (length(unique_clusters) == 1) {
  message("\n*** WARNING: ALL ATAC cells are assigned to a single cluster! ***")
  message("This explains why all RNA clusters map to the same ATAC cluster.")
  message("Root cause is likely in atac_label_edges construction.\n")
}

# ============================================================================
# 1. Cell Count Distribution
# ============================================================================
message("1. Checking cell distribution across ATAC label categories...")

# Look at the actual atac_label_edges matrix structure
message("\nATAC Label Edges Matrix Dimensions:")
message("  Rows (cells): ", nrow(atac_label_edges))
message("  Columns (label categories): ", ncol(atac_label_edges))
message("  Column names: ", paste(colnames(atac_label_edges), collapse = ", "))

# Check which column has max values for each cell
cluster_assignment_counts <- table(apply(atac_label_edges, 1, which.max))
names(cluster_assignment_counts) <- colnames(atac_label_edges)[as.numeric(names(cluster_assignment_counts))]

cluster_dist_df <- data.frame(
  cluster = names(cluster_assignment_counts),
  n_cells = as.numeric(cluster_assignment_counts),
  percentage = as.numeric(cluster_assignment_counts) / sum(cluster_assignment_counts) * 100
)

print(cluster_dist_df)

p1 <- ggplot(cluster_dist_df, aes(x = reorder(cluster, -n_cells), y = n_cells, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n_cells, "\n(", round(percentage, 1), "%)")), 
            vjust = -0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "ATAC Cluster Assignment Distribution",
       subtitle = "Based on which label edge is strongest per cell",
       x = "ATAC Label Category", y = "Number of Cells") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

print(p1)


# ============================================================================
# 2. Label Edge Weight Distribution
# ============================================================================
message("\n2. Analyzing label edge weights across categories...")

# Distribution of edge weights per label category
edge_weight_stats <- data.frame(
  cluster = colnames(atac_label_edges),
  mean_weight = colMeans(atac_label_edges),
  median_weight = apply(atac_label_edges, 2, median),
  max_weight = apply(atac_label_edges, 2, max),
  n_nonzero = colSums(atac_label_edges > 0),
  pct_nonzero = colSums(atac_label_edges > 0) / nrow(atac_label_edges) * 100
)

print(edge_weight_stats)

p2 <- ggplot(edge_weight_stats, aes(x = cluster, y = mean_weight, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Mean Label Edge Weight per Category",
       subtitle = "Higher weight = more cells strongly connected",
       x = "ATAC Label Category", y = "Mean Edge Weight") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p3 <- ggplot(edge_weight_stats, aes(x = cluster, y = pct_nonzero, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Percentage of Cells with Non-Zero Edges",
       subtitle = "Connectivity breadth across cells",
       x = "ATAC Label Category", y = "% Cells Connected") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


# ============================================================================
# 3. Heatmap of Label Edge Matrix
# ============================================================================
message("\n3. Visualizing label edge matrix structure...")

# Sample cells for visualization
n_cells_to_plot <- min(500, nrow(atac_label_edges))
sample_cells <- sample(nrow(atac_label_edges), n_cells_to_plot)

edge_matrix_subset <- atac_label_edges[sample_cells, ]

# Create heatmap
library(reshape2)
edge_df <- melt(as.matrix(edge_matrix_subset))
colnames(edge_df) <- c("cell", "label_category", "weight")

p4 <- ggplot(edge_df, aes(x = label_category, y = as.factor(cell), fill = weight)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "white", mid = "yellow", high = "red", midpoint = 0.5) +
  labs(title = paste0("ATAC Label Edge Matrix (", n_cells_to_plot, " random cells)"),
       subtitle = "Does one column dominate?",
       x = "Label Category", y = "Cell (sampled)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank())

print(p4)


# ============================================================================
# 4. Gene Activity Analysis by Label Category
# ============================================================================
message("\n4. Comparing gene activity by label category...")

# For each label category, get cells with strong edges to that category
gene_activity_by_label <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:ncol(atac_label_edges)) {
  label_name <- colnames(atac_label_edges)[i]
  
  # Get cells with strong edges to this label (top 20%)
  edge_strengths <- atac_label_edges[, i]
  threshold <- quantile(edge_strengths[edge_strengths > 0], 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
  strong_cells <- names(which(edge_strengths > threshold))
  strong_cells <- intersect(strong_cells, rownames(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final))
  
  if (length(strong_cells) > 5) {
    gene_activity_by_label <- rbind(gene_activity_by_label, data.frame(
      label = label_name,
      n_cells = length(strong_cells),
      mean_total_activity = mean(Matrix::rowSums(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final[strong_cells, ])),
      mean_active_genes = mean(Matrix::rowSums(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final[strong_cells, ] > 0)),
      sparsity = mean(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final[strong_cells, ] == 0) * 100
    ))
  }
}

if (nrow(gene_activity_by_label) > 0) {
  print(gene_activity_by_label)
  
  p5 <- ggplot(gene_activity_by_label, aes(x = label, y = mean_active_genes, fill = label)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(title = "Mean Active Genes by Label Category",
         subtitle = "Using cells with strong edges to each label",
         x = "Label Category", y = "Mean N Active Genes") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
} else {
  p5 <- ggplot() + 
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "Insufficient data") +
    theme_void()
}


# ============================================================================
# 5. Influence Score Analysis
```
