```{r Investigate ATAC Cluster Dominance - FIXED}
# ============================================================================
message("\n5. Analyzing influence scores from mapping...")

influence_by_atac <- data.frame(
  atac_label = colnames(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2),
  total_influence = colSums(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2),
  max_influence = apply(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2, 2, max),
  n_rna_clusters_mapping = colSums(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2 > 0.01),
  mean_influence = colMeans(cw2_summary$info_1_to_2)
)

print(influence_by_atac)

p6 <- ggplot(influence_by_atac, aes(x = atac_label, y = total_influence, fill = atac_label)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Total Influence Score per ATAC Label",
       subtitle = "Sum of all RNA→ATAC influences",
       x = "ATAC Label", y = "Total Influence") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


# ============================================================================
# 6. Label Edge Construction Method Check
# ============================================================================
message("\n6. Checking how ATAC label edges were constructed...")

message("Method used: ", 
        if(exists("motif_regions_df")) "Motif-based" else "Gene-activity clustering")

if (!exists("motif_regions_df")) {
  message("\nGene-activity clustering approach:")
  message("  This creates pseudo-clusters from gene activity similarity")
  message("  Problem: If one cluster dominates the gene activity space,")
  message("  all cells may be assigned similar label edges")
}


# ============================================================================
# 7. Combined Plot
# ============================================================================
combined_plot <- (p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4) / (p5 | p6)

print(combined_plot)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "atac_label_edge_diagnostic.png"),
       combined_plot, width = 16, height = 14)


# ============================================================================
# 8. Root Cause Analysis
# ============================================================================
message("\n========== ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS ==========\n")

message("FINDING: ", length(unique_clusters), " unique ATAC cluster(s) detected")

if (length(unique_clusters) == 1) {
  message("\n*** PRIMARY ISSUE IDENTIFIED ***")
  message("ALL ATAC cells are being assigned to a single label category.")
  message("\nLikely causes:")
  message("1. Label edge matrix (atac_label_edges) has one dominant column")
  message("2. Gene-activity clustering created only one meaningful cluster")
  message("3. Clustering parameters (n_clusters, resolution) too coarse")
  message("\nEvidence from label edge weights:")
  print(edge_weight_stats[order(-edge_weight_stats$mean_weight), ])
  
  # Find which column dominates
  dominant_col <- which.max(edge_weight_stats$mean_weight)
  message("\nDominant label category: ", colnames(atac_label_edges)[dominant_col])
  message("Mean weight: ", round(edge_weight_stats$mean_weight[dominant_col], 4))
  message("% cells connected: ", round(edge_weight_stats$pct_nonzero[dominant_col], 1), "%")
}

message("\n========== RECOMMENDED FIXES ==========\n")
message("1. Increase n_clusters in buildAtacLabelEdgesFromGeneActivity()")
message("   Current: 15  →  Try: 25-30")
message("2. Add more stringent filtering in label edge construction")
message("3. Check if gene activity matrix has sufficient diversity")
message("4. Consider alternative label strategies (e.g., peak-based)")
message("==================================================\n")


# Save diagnostics
write.csv(edge_weight_stats, 
          file = file.path(output_dir, "atac_label_edge_diagnostics.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

# Spatial Validation of Separate Graphs
```{r Spatial Validation of Separate Graphs}
# --- Spatial Validation of Separate Graphs (Neighbor Comparison) ---
k_top_neighbors_for_plot <- 10
k_next_neighbors_for_plot <- 10

message("--- Spatial Validation for RNA Graph Coherence (Neighbor Comparison) ---")
p_spatial_coherence_rna <- plotSpatialGraphCoherence(
  combined_rna_atac_graph = rna_graph, # Use the RNA graph
  rna_spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  n_query_cells = 4,
  k_top_neighbors = k_top_neighbors_for_plot,
  k_next_neighbors = k_next_neighbors_for_plot
)
print(p_spatial_coherence_rna)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_graph_to_spatial_overlay.png", plot = p_spatial_coherence_rna)

message("--- Spatial Validation for ATAC Graph Coherence (Neighbor Comparison) ---")
p_spatial_coherence_atac <- plotSpatialGraphCoherence(
  combined_rna_atac_graph = atac_graph, # Use the ATAC graph
  rna_spatial_coords_df = atac_spatial_coords_filtered, # Use ATAC spatial coords for ATAC validation
  n_query_cells = 4,
  k_top_neighbors = k_top_neighbors_for_plot,
  k_next_neighbors = k_next_neighbors_for_plot
)
print(p_spatial_coherence_atac)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_graph_to_spatial_overlay.png", plot = p_spatial_coherence_atac)




# Define k for coherence assessment
k_coherence_neighbors <- 10 

# --- Prepare feature matrices for similarity calculation ---
# For RNA: Use normalized data slot from Seurat. This should be 'genes x cells'.
rna_feature_matrix_for_sim <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")

# For ATAC: Use the atac_gene_activity_matrix_final.
# It is typically 'cells x genes', so it needs to be transposed to 'genes x cells'
# for cosine similarity calculation with sparse matrices.
atac_feature_matrix_for_sim <- t(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final)

# --- Compute coherence for two neighbor rank ranges and compare with Random baseline plots ---
rangeA <- c(1,10)
rangeB <- c(11,20)

# --- For RNA ---
rna_res_A <- assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall(
  feature_graph = rna_graph,
  feature_matrix_for_similarity = rna_feature_matrix_for_sim,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = max(rangeA[2], rangeB[2]), # internal k used for some operations; function uses neighbor_rank_range for selection
  modality_name = "RNA",
  n_workers = 8,
  neighbor_rank_range = rangeA
)
rna_res_B <- assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall(
  feature_graph = rna_graph,
  feature_matrix_for_similarity = rna_feature_matrix_for_sim,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = max(rangeA[2], rangeB[2]),
  modality_name = "RNA",
  n_workers = 8,
  neighbor_rank_range = rangeB
)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn.png", plot = rna_res_A$plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn.png", plot = rna_res_A$plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn.png", plot = rna_res_A$plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_plot_spatial_coherence_metrics.png", plot = rna_res_A$plot_spatial_coherence_metrics)

rna_coherence_results_random <- validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom(
  feature_graph = rna_graph,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = k_coherence_neighbors,
  num_random_comparisons = 5,
  modality_name = "RNA",
  n_workers = 8
)
print(rna_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_plot_comparison_rand.png", plot = rna_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)



# Combine coherence_df from the two runs and the random baseline
dfA <- rna_res_A$coherence_df
dfA$group <- paste0("RNA ", rangeA[1], ":", rangeA[2], " NN")
dfB <- rna_res_B$coherence_df
dfB$group <- paste0("RNA ", rangeB[1], ":", rangeB[2], " NN")
# validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom returns per-graph/random combined df in $coherence_df
dfRand <- NULL
if (!is.null(rna_coherence_results_random$coherence_df)) {
  # rna_coherence_results_random returns rows for both Graph Neighbors and Random Cells; extract Random
  if ("graph_type" %in% colnames(rna_coherence_results_random$coherence_df)) {
    dfRand_tmp <- rna_coherence_results_random$coherence_df
    dfRand_tmp <- dfRand_tmp[dfRand_tmp$graph_type == "Random Cells", , drop = FALSE]
    dfRand <- data.frame(cell_id = dfRand_tmp$cell_id,
                         median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors = dfRand_tmp$median_spatial_dist,
                         median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors = dfRand_tmp$median_graph_sim,
                         group = paste0("RNA Random"))
  } else {
    # fallback: if structure differs, skip
    dfRand <- NULL
  }
}

combined_rna_compare <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dfA[, c("cell_id", "median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors", "median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors", "group")],
  dfB[, c("cell_id", "median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors", "median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors", "group")],
  dfRand
)

# Plot combined densities for RNA
p_rna_combined_spatial <- ggplot2::ggplot(combined_rna_compare, ggplot2::aes(x = median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors, fill = group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "RNA: Median Spatial Distance — Neighbor Rank Ranges vs Random", x = "Median Spatial Distance", y = "Density", fill = "Group") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() + ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_rna_combined_spatial)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "RNA_neighbor_ranges_vs_random_spatial_dist.png"), plot = p_rna_combined_spatial)

p_rna_combined_sim <- ggplot2::ggplot(combined_rna_compare, ggplot2::aes(x = median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors, fill = group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "RNA: Median Graph Similarity — Neighbor Rank Ranges vs Random", x = "Median Graph Similarity", y = "Density", fill = "Group") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() + ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_rna_combined_sim)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "RNA_neighbor_ranges_vs_random_graph_sim.png"), plot = p_rna_combined_sim)


# --- For ATAC ---
atac_res_A <- assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall(
  feature_graph = atac_graph,
  feature_matrix_for_similarity = atac_feature_matrix_for_sim,
  spatial_coords_df = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = max(rangeA[2], rangeB[2]),
  modality_name = "ATAC",
  n_workers = 8,
  neighbor_rank_range = rangeA
)
atac_res_B <- assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall(
  feature_graph = atac_graph,
  feature_matrix_for_similarity = atac_feature_matrix_for_sim,
  spatial_coords_df = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = max(rangeA[2], rangeB[2]),
  modality_name = "ATAC",
  n_workers = 8,
  neighbor_rank_range = rangeB
)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn.png", plot = atac_res_A$plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn.png", plot = atac_res_A$plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn.png", plot = atac_res_A$plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_plot_spatial_coherence_metrics.png", plot = atac_res_A$plot_spatial_coherence_metrics)

atac_coherence_results_random <- validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom(
  feature_graph = atac_graph,
  spatial_coords_df = atac_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = k_coherence_neighbors,
  num_random_comparisons = 5,
  modality_name = "ATAC",
  n_workers = 8
)
print(atac_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_plot_comparison_rand.png", plot = atac_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)

dfA_atac <- atac_res_A$coherence_df
dfA_atac$group <- paste0("ATAC ", rangeA[1], ":", rangeA[2], " NN")
dfB_atac <- atac_res_B$coherence_df
dfB_atac$group <- paste0("ATAC ", rangeB[1], ":", rangeB[2], " NN")

dfRand_atac <- NULL
if (!is.null(atac_coherence_results_random$coherence_df) && "graph_type" %in% colnames(atac_coherence_results_random$coherence_df)) {
  dfRand_tmp2 <- atac_coherence_results_random$coherence_df
  dfRand_tmp2 <- dfRand_tmp2[dfRand_tmp2$graph_type == "Random Cells", , drop = FALSE]
  dfRand_atac <- data.frame(cell_id = dfRand_tmp2$cell_id,
                            median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors = dfRand_tmp2$median_spatial_dist,
                            median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors = dfRand_tmp2$median_graph_sim,
                            group = paste0("ATAC Random"))
}

combined_atac_compare <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dfA_atac[, c("cell_id", "median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors", "median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors", "group")],
  dfB_atac[, c("cell_id", "median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors", "median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors", "group")],
  dfRand_atac
)

p_atac_combined_spatial <- ggplot2::ggplot(combined_atac_compare, ggplot2::aes(x = median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors, fill = group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "ATAC: Median Spatial Distance — Neighbor Rank Ranges vs Random", x = "Median Spatial Distance", y = "Density", fill = "Group") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() + ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_atac_combined_spatial)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ATAC_neighbor_ranges_vs_random_spatial_dist.png"), plot = p_atac_combined_spatial)

p_atac_combined_sim <- ggplot2::ggplot(combined_atac_compare, ggplot2::aes(x = median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors, fill = group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "ATAC: Median Graph Similarity — Neighbor Rank Ranges vs Random", x = "Median Graph Similarity", y = "Density", fill = "Group") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() + ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_atac_combined_sim)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "ATAC_neighbor_ranges_vs_random_graph_sim.png"), plot = p_atac_combined_sim)



# --- Analyze Smoothed RNA Graph ---
message("\n--- Analyzing Smoothed RNA Graph Properties ---")
# Prepare feature matrix for smoothed RNA (from the smoothed Seurat object)
smoothed_rna_feature_matrix_for_sim <- GetAssayData(smoothed_seurat_obj, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")

smoothed_rna_coherence_results <- assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall(
  feature_graph = smoothed_rna_graph,
  feature_matrix_for_similarity = smoothed_rna_feature_matrix_for_sim,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered, # Use the same spatial coords as original RNA
  k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors, # Use same k as original RNA graph
  modality_name = "Smoothed RNA",
  n_workers = 8
)
print(smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn)
print(smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn)
print(smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn)
print(smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_spatial_coherence_metrics)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/SmoothedRNA_plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn.png", plot = smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_dist_spatial_for_graph_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/SmoothedRNA_plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn.png", plot = smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_sim_graph_for_spatial_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/SmoothedRNA_plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn.png", plot = smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_sim_graph_for_graph_nn)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/SmoothedRNA_plot_spatial_coherence_metrics.png", plot = smoothed_rna_coherence_results$plot_spatial_coherence_metrics)


message("\n--- Validating Smoothed RNA Graph Coherence Against Random ---")
smoothed_rna_coherence_results_random <- validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom(
  feature_graph = smoothed_rna_graph,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = k_coherence_neighbors, # Use same k as other validations
  num_random_comparisons = 5,
  modality_name = "Smoothed RNA",
  n_workers = 8
)
print(smoothed_rna_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/SmoothedRNA_plot_comparison_rand.png", plot = smoothed_rna_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)


# --- Validate Graph Coherence Against Random Cells ---
k_coherence_neighbors <- 10 # Ensure this is set (already defined for assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall)
num_random_comparisons_val <- 5 # Number of random comparisons to average
n_workers_val <- 8 # Number of parallel workers for validation

message("\n--- Validating RNA Graph Coherence Against Random ---")
rna_coherence_results_random <- validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom(
  feature_graph = rna_graph,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = k_coherence_neighbors,
  num_random_comparisons = num_random_comparisons_val,
  modality_name = "RNA",
  n_workers = n_workers_val
)
print(rna_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_plot_comparison_rand.png", plot = rna_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)

message("\n--- Validating ATAC Graph Coherence Against Random ---")
atac_coherence_results_random <- validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom(
  feature_graph = atac_graph,
  spatial_coords_df = atac_spatial_coords_filtered, # Use ATAC spatial coords for ATAC validation
  k_neighbors = k_coherence_neighbors,
  num_random_comparisons = num_random_comparisons_val,
  modality_name = "ATAC",
  n_workers = n_workers_val
)
print(atac_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_plot_comparison_rand.png", plot = atac_coherence_results_random$plot_comparison)

# Safely combine available coherence dataframes for joint plotting
combined_coherence_df <- data.frame()
# Helper to safely extract coherence_df and add modality label
safe_bind <- function(x, label) {
  if (!is.null(x) && is.list(x) && !is.null(x$coherence_df) && nrow(x$coherence_df) > 0) {
    df <- x$coherence_df
    if (!"modality" %in% colnames(df)) df$modality <- label
    return(df)
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
}
to_bind <- list(
  safe_bind(rna_coherence_results, "RNA"),
  safe_bind(atac_coherence_results, "ATAC"),
  safe_bind(smoothed_rna_coherence_results, "Smoothed RNA"),
  # include random validations if they have coherence_df
  safe_bind(rna_coherence_results_random, "RNA_random"),
  safe_bind(atac_coherence_results_random, "ATAC_random"),
  safe_bind(smoothed_rna_coherence_results_random, "SmoothedRNA_random")
)
to_bind <- to_bind[!sapply(to_bind, is.null)]
if (length(to_bind) > 0) { 
  combined_coherence_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(Filter(Negate(is.null), to_bind))
} else combined_coherence_df <- data.frame()

# Re-plot combined densities to include Smoothed RNA
p_joint_spatial_dist <- ggplot(combined_coherence_df, aes(x = median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors, fill = modality)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, adjust = 1.5) +
  labs(title = paste0("Median Spatial Distance of Graph Neighbors (k=", k_coherence_neighbors, ")"),
       x = "Median Spatial Distance (Lower = Better Coherence)", y = "Density", fill = "Modality") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_joint_spatial_dist)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/p_joint_spatial_dist_all.png", plot = p_joint_spatial_dist) # Changed filename

p_joint_graph_sim <- ggplot(combined_coherence_df, aes(x = median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors, fill = modality)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, adjust = 1.5) +
  labs(title = paste0("Median Graph Similarity of Spatial Neighbors (k=", k_coherence_neighbors, ")"),
       x = "Median Graph Similarity (Higher = Better Coherence)", y = "Density", fill = "Modality") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_joint_graph_sim)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/p_joint_graph_sim_all.png", plot = p_joint_graph_sim) # Changed filename

p_scatter_metrics <- ggplot(combined_coherence_df, aes(x = median_spatial_dist_of_graph_neighbors, y = median_graph_sim_of_spatial_neighbors, color = modality)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = paste0("Spatial-Graph Coherence per Cell (k=", k_coherence_neighbors, ")"),
       x = "Median Spatial Distance of Graph Neighbors (Lower = Better)",
       y = "Median Graph Similarity of Spatial Neighbors (Higher = Better)",
       color = "Modality") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
print(p_scatter_metrics)
ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/p_scatter_metrics_all.png", plot = p_scatter_metrics) # Changed filename

```

# Analyzing Graph Contextual Similarity
```{r Analyzing Graph Contextual Similarity}

# --- Analyzing RNA Graph Contextual Similarity ---

# Define parameters for the analysis
k_spatial_neighbors_rna <- 20       # Number of spatially close neighbors to consider
k_random_samples_rna <- 50         # Number of random cells to sample for baseline
score_method_rna <- "normalized_ratio" # Method for score calculation

# Run the analysis
rna_context_similarity <- computeSpatialContextualFeatureScore(
  feature_matrix_for_similarity = rna_graph,
  spatial_coords_df = rna_spatial_coords_filtered,
  k_neighbors = k_spatial_neighbors_rna,
  modality_name = "RNA",
  n_workers = 8,
  batch_size = 1000L,
  n_pca_embed = 50L,
  score_method = "normalized_ratio"
)

# Display the spatial plot
if (!is.null(rna_context_similarity$spatial_plot)) {
  print(rna_context_similarity$spatial_plot)
  ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_context_similarity_spatial.png", plot = rna_context_similarity$spatial_plot)
}

# Display the score distribution plot
if (!is.null(rna_context_similarity$score_distribution_plot)) {
  print(rna_context_similarity$score_distribution_plot)
  ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_context_similarity_distribution.png", plot = rna_context_similarity$score_distribution_plot)
}



```

# Analyse Graphs
```{r Analyse Graphs}
#' Analyze and Compare Sparse Feature Graphs
#'
#' \code{analyze_feature_graph()} analyzes the properties of a sparse feature graph
#' (e.g., cell-cell similarity graph) and generates metrics and plots for interpretation.
#' It calculates sparsity, edge count, similarity distribution, and captures graph construction details.
#'
#' @param graph A sparse matrix representing the cell-to-cell similarity graph.
#' @param modality_name Character string for the modality (e.g., "RNA", "ATAC").
#' @param k_neighbors Integer, the k value used for KNN graph construction.
#' @param graph_method Character string describing the graph construction method (e.g., "PCA + kNN + Gaussian Similarity").
#' @param similarity_decay Character string describing the similarity decay function used (e.g., "Gaussian", "Linear").
#' @return A list containing analysis results: modality, num_cells, sparsity, edge count,
#'   similarity range/median/mean, graph construction parameters, and a plot of similarity distribution.
#' @export
analyze_feature_graph <- function(graph, modality_name, k_neighbors, graph_method, similarity_decay) {
  message("\n--- Analyzing Feature Graph for ", modality_name, " ---")
  
  # --- 1. Sparsity and Basic Edge Count ---
  num_cells_graph <- nrow(graph)
  total_possible_edges <- as.numeric(num_cells_graph) * as.numeric(num_cells_graph)
  num_non_zero_edges <- Matrix::nnzero(graph)
  
  # Calculate sparsity as percentage of zeros.
  # If num_cells_graph is 0 or 1, total_possible_edges might be 0 or 1.
  if (total_possible_edges == 0) {
      sparsity_percent_zeros <- 0 # Or NA, but 0 is reasonable if no cells.
      connectivity_density <- 0
  } else {
      sparsity_percent_zeros <- 100 * (1 - num_non_zero_edges / total_possible_edges)
      connectivity_density <- 100 * (num_non_zero_edges / total_possible_edges)
  }

  message("Graph Dimensions: ", num_cells_graph, "x", num_cells_graph)
  message("Number of non-zero edges (connections): ", num_non_zero_edges)
  message("Graph Sparsity (percentage of zeros): ", round(sparsity_percent_zeros, 2), "%")
  message("Graph Connectivity Density (percentage of non-zeros): ", round(connectivity_density, 4), "%")
  
  # --- 2. Analyze Non-zero Similarity Values ---
  # Extracting similarities assumes graph stores similarities
  
  graph_sims_dt <- data.table::as.data.table(Matrix::summary(graph))
  non_zero_sims <- graph_sims_dt$x
  
  # Initialize results with NA/defaults for cases with no valid data
  analysis_results_list <- list(
    modality = modality_name,
    num_cells = num_cells_graph,
    sparsity_percent_zeros = round(sparsity_percent_zeros, 2),
    num_edges = num_non_zero_edges,
    min_sim = NA_real_, max_sim = NA_real_, mean_sim = NA_real_, median_sim = NA_real_,
    k_neighbors = k_neighbors,
    graph_method = graph_method,
    similarity_decay = similarity_decay,
    sim_hist_plot = NULL # Placeholder for plot
  )
  
  if (length(non_zero_sims) == 0 || num_cells_graph <= 1) {
    message("No non-zero similarities found or too few cells for similarity analysis.")
    analysis_results_list$sim_hist_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot() + 
      ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No valid similarities to plot") + 
      ggplot2::theme_void()
    return(analysis_results_list)
  }
  
  message("Analysis of Non-Zero Similarities:")
  message("  Range: [", round(min(non_zero_sims), 3), ", ", round(max(non_zero_sims), 3), "]")
  message("  Median: ", round(median(non_zero_sims), 3))
  message("  Mean: ", round(mean(non_zero_sims), 3))
  
  analysis_results_list$min_sim <- round(min(non_zero_sims), 3)
  analysis_results_list$max_sim <- round(max(non_zero_sims), 3)
  analysis_results_list$mean_sim <- round(mean(non_zero_sims), 3)
  analysis_results_list$median_sim <- round(median(non_zero_sims), 3)
  
  # --- 3. Histogram/Density Plot of non-zero similarities ---
  # Adjust binwidth dynamically based on range, but cap it.
  sim_range <- max(non_zero_sims) - min(non_zero_sims)
  binwidth <- if (sim_range > 0) min(0.05, sim_range / 10) else 0.05
  if (binwidth <= 0) binwidth <- 0.05 # Ensure binwidth is positive

  sim_hist_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(data.table::data.table(sim = non_zero_sims), ggplot2::aes(x = sim)) +
    ggplot2::geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth = binwidth, fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.7, color = "black") + 
    ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.4, fill = "blue") +
    ggplot2::labs(title = paste0(modality_name, ": Similarity Distribution\n",
                                 graph_method, " (k=", k_neighbors, ", Decay: ", similarity_decay, ")"),
                  x = "Similarity Score", y = "Density") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10))
  
  analysis_results_list$sim_hist_plot <- sim_hist_plot
  
  return(analysis_results_list)
}

# --- Analysis of ATAC Gene Activity Matrix ---
message("\n--- Analyzing ATAC Gene Activity Matrix ---")
# Ensure 'atac_gene_activity_matrix_final' is the correct variable holding the ATAC gene activity matrix from r_29
if (exists("atac_gene_activity_matrix_final") && !is.null(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final) && nrow(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final) > 0 && ncol(atac_gene_activity_matrix_final) > 0) {
  
  atac_gene_activity_matrix <- atac_gene_activity_matrix_final # Use the final variable
  n_atac_cells <- nrow(atac_gene_activity_matrix)
  n_atac_genes <- ncol(atac_gene_activity_matrix)
  
  # Calculate sparsity of the gene activity matrix
  num_non_zero_atac_entries <- Matrix::nnzero(atac_gene_activity_matrix)
  sparsity_atac_zeros <- 100 * (1 - num_non_zero_atac_entries / (n_atac_cells * n_atac_genes))
  
  message("ATAC Gene Activity Matrix Dimensions: ", n_atac_cells, "x", n_atac_genes)
  message("Number of non-zero gene activity entries: ", num_non_zero_atac_entries)
  message("ATAC Gene Activity Sparsity (zeros): ", round(sparsity_atac_zeros, 2), "%")
  
  # Gene activity per cell
  genes_per_cell_atac <- Matrix::rowSums(atac_gene_activity_matrix > 0)
  message("Average genes with non-zero activity per cell: ", round(mean(genes_per_cell_atac), 2))
  message("Median genes with non-zero activity per cell: ", round(median(genes_per_cell_atac), 2))
  
  # Distribution of gene activity scores (non-zero values)
  atac_gene_activity_scores <- atac_gene_activity_matrix@x # Access non-zero values
  
  if (length(atac_gene_activity_scores) > 0) {
    message("Analysis of ATAC Gene Activity Scores (non-zero):")
    message("  Range: [", round(min(atac_gene_activity_scores), 3), ", ", round(max(atac_gene_activity_scores), 3), "]")
    message("  Median: ", round(median(atac_gene_activity_scores), 3))
    message("  Mean: ", round(mean(atac_gene_activity_scores), 3))
    
    # Plot distribution of ATAC gene activity scores
    activity_score_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(data.table::data.table(score = atac_gene_activity_scores), ggplot2::aes(x = score)) +
      ggplot2::geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth = 0.1, fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
      ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.4, fill = "blue") +
      ggplot2::labs(title = "Distribution of ATAC Gene Activity Scores (Non-Zero)",
                    x = "Gene Activity Score", y = "Density") +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
      ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5))
    print(activity_score_plot)
    
  } else {
    message("No non-zero ATAC gene activity scores found.")
  }
  
} else {
  message("ATAC gene activity matrix ('atac_gene_activity_matrix_final') not found or is empty. Skipping analysis.")
}

# --- Analysis of ATAC PCA ---
message("\n--- Analyzing ATAC PCA ---")

# Ensure 'atac_pca_res' is correctly stored and accessible from createATACCellGraph
if (exists("atac_pca_res") && !is.null(atac_pca_res) && !is.null(atac_pca_res$sdev)) {
  # Variance explained by each PC
  var_explained_atac <- atac_pca_res$sdev^2 / sum(atac_pca_res$sdev^2)
  
  # Plot elbow plot for ATAC PCA
  atac_pca_elbow_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(data.table::data.table(PC = seq_along(var_explained_atac), Variance = var_explained_atac), ggplot2::aes(x = PC, y = Variance)) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 3, color = "darkblue") +
    ggplot2::geom_line(color = "darkblue") +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "ATAC PCA Variance Explained", x = "Principal Component", y = "Proportion of Variance Explained") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
    ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5))
  
  message("First 5 PCs explain: ", paste(round(var_explained_atac[1:5]*100, 2), "%", collapse = ", "))
  print(atac_pca_elbow_plot)
  
} else {
  message("ATAC PCA results ('atac_pca_res') not found or not properly computed. Skipping PCA analysis.")
  message("Ensure that 'createATACCellGraph' correctly stores and makes 'atac_pca_res' available if you want to analyze it.")
}

# --- Storing Graph Construction Info ---
graph_construction_details <- list()

# RNA Graph Info
rna_method <- "PCA + kNN + Gaussian Similarity" # Matches createRNACellGraph logic
rna_similarity_decay <- "Gaussian"
rna_graph_params_details <- list(
  k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors,
  pca_dims = graph_params$rna_feature_dims # Representing PC usage
)
# Populate RNA PCA variance if available from Seurat object
if (!is.null(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed) && !is.null(seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed@reductions$pca)) {
  rna_pca_obj <- seurat_obj_rna_preprocessed@reductions$pca
  if (!is.null(rna_pca_obj) && !is.null(rna_pca_obj@stdev)) {
    rna_var_explained <- rna_pca_obj@stdev^2 / sum(rna_pca_obj@stdev^2)
    dims_for_rna <- graph_params$rna_feature_dims
    if (!is.null(dims_for_rna) && length(dims_for_rna) > 0 && length(rna_var_explained) >= max(dims_for_rna)) {
      rna_graph_params_details$pca_variance_explained <- rna_var_explained[dims_for_rna]
    } else {
      rna_graph_params_details$pca_variance_explained <- rna_var_explained
    }
  }
}
graph_construction_details$RNA <- list(method = rna_method, similarity_decay = rna_similarity_decay, params = rna_graph_params_details)


# ATAC Graph Info
# Method description updated to reflect Gaussian kernel
atac_method <- "Gene Activity + PCA + kNN + Gaussian Similarity"
atac_similarity_decay <- "Gaussian" # Changed to Gaussian
atac_graph_params_details <- list(
  pca_dims = graph_params$atac_pca_dims,
  k_neighbors = graph_params$atac_k_neighbors
)
# Populate ATAC PCA variance if available (assuming 'atac_pca_res' is created and stored in the environment)
if (exists("atac_pca_res") && !is.null(atac_pca_res) && !is.null(atac_pca_res$sdev)) {
  var_explained_atac <- atac_pca_res$sdev^2 / sum(atac_pca_res$sdev^2)
  dims_for_atac <- graph_params$atac_pca_dims
  if (!is.null(dims_for_atac) && length(dims_for_atac) > 0 && length(var_explained_atac) >= max(dims_for_atac)) {
    atac_graph_params_details$pca_variance_explained <- var_explained_atac[dims_for_atac]
  } else {
    atac_graph_params_details$pca_variance_explained <- var_explained_atac
  }
}
graph_construction_details$ATAC <- list(method = atac_method, similarity_decay = atac_similarity_decay, params = atac_graph_params_details)


# --- Analyze Graphs and Store Results ---
analysis_results <- list()

# RNA Graph Analysis
if (exists("rna_graph") && !is.null(rna_graph) && Matrix::nnzero(rna_graph) > 0) {
  analysis_results$RNA <- analyze_feature_graph(
    graph = rna_graph,
    modality_name = "RNA",
    k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors, # Pass k
    graph_method = graph_construction_details$RNA$method, # Pass method
    similarity_decay = graph_construction_details$RNA$similarity_decay # Pass decay
  )
  analysis_results$RNA$construction_info <- graph_construction_details$RNA # Store detailed params
  print(analysis_results$RNA$sim_hist_plot)
  ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/RNA_graph_similarity_distribution.png", plot = analysis_results$RNA$sim_hist_plot)

} else {
  message("RNA graph is missing or empty. Skipping its analysis.")
}

# ATAC Graph Analysis
if (exists("atac_graph") && !is.null(atac_graph) && Matrix::nnzero(atac_graph) > 0) {
  analysis_results$ATAC <- analyze_feature_graph(
    graph = atac_graph,
    modality_name = "ATAC",
    k_neighbors = graph_params$atac_k_neighbors, # Pass k
    graph_method = graph_construction_details$ATAC$method, # Use the updated ATAC method description
    similarity_decay = graph_construction_details$ATAC$similarity_decay # Use the updated ATAC decay
  )
  analysis_results$ATAC$construction_info <- graph_construction_details$ATAC # Store detailed params
  print(analysis_results$ATAC$sim_hist_plot)
  ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/ATAC_graph_similarity_distribution.png", plot = analysis_results$ATAC$sim_hist_plot)
} else {
  message("ATAC graph is missing or empty. Skipping its analysis.")
}

# Smoothed RNA Graph Analysis
# Check if smoothed_rna_graph exists and is valid
if (!is.null(smoothed_rna_graph) && Matrix::nnzero(smoothed_rna_graph) > 0) {
  analysis_results$SmoothedRNA <- analyze_feature_graph(
    graph = smoothed_rna_graph,
    modality_name = "Smoothed RNA",
    k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors, # Use k from graph_params
    graph_method = "Smoothed RNA PCA + kNN + Gaussian Similarity", # Custom method name
    similarity_decay = "Gaussian" # Assuming Gaussian decay as per createRNACellGraph
  )
  # Store construction info specific to Smoothed RNA
  analysis_results$SmoothedRNA$construction_info <- list(
    method = "Smoothed RNA PCA + kNN + Gaussian Similarity",
    similarity_decay = "Gaussian",
    params = list(
      k_neighbors = graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors,
      pca_dims = graph_params$rna_feature_dims # Corresponds to PCs used from smoothed_seurat_obj
    )
  )
  print(analysis_results$SmoothedRNA$sim_hist_plot)
  ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/SmoothedRNA_graph_similarity_distribution.png", plot = analysis_results$SmoothedRNA$sim_hist_plot)
} else {
  message("Smoothed RNA graph is missing or empty. Skipping its analysis.")
}


# --- Compile and Print Summary Table of Graphs ---
# This section relies on the analysis_results being populated correctly.
# Now, compile the summary table including Smoothed RNA
summary_table_graphs <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(analysis_results), function(mod_name) {
  res <- analysis_results[[mod_name]]
  dt <- data.table::data.table(
    Modality = mod_name,
    Method = res$graph_method,
    Sim_Decay = res$similarity_decay,
    Num_Cells = res$num_cells,
    Sparsity_Pct_Zeros = res$sparsity_percent_zeros,
    Num_Edges = res$num_edges,
    Min_Sim = res$min_sim,
    Median_Sim = res$median_sim,
    Mean_Sim = res$mean_sim,
    Max_Sim = res$max_sim,
    k_neighbors = res$k_neighbors
  )
  # Add PCA dim info if available
  if (!is.null(res$construction_info) && !is.null(res$construction_info$params)) {
      if (!is.null(res$construction_info$params$pca_dims)) {
          pca_dims_value <- res$construction_info$params$pca_dims
          # Format dims nicely, e.g., "1:30" or "1,2,3"
          pca_dims_str <- if (is.numeric(pca_dims_value) && length(pca_dims_value) > 1) paste(min(pca_dims_value), ":", max(pca_dims_value), sep="") else paste(pca_dims_value, collapse=",")
          dt[, PCA_Dims := pca_dims_str]
      } else if (!is.null(res$construction_info$params$dims)) { # For original RNA graph
          dims_value <- res$construction_info$params$dims
          dims_str <- if (length(dims_value) > 1) paste(min(dims_value), ":", max(dims_value), sep="") else paste(dims_value, collapse=",")
          dt[, PCA_Dims := dims_str]
      } else {
          dt[, PCA_Dims := NA]
      }
  } else {
      dt[, PCA_Dims := NA]
  }
  return(dt)
}))

print("--- Feature Graph Construction and Similarity Summary ---")
print(summary_table_graphs)

# --- Plot Comparison of Similarity Distributions ---
# Extract data for plotting, ensuring correct modalities and handling missing plots
rna_sim_data <- if (!is.null(analysis_results$RNA$sim_hist_plot$data)) {
    analysis_results$RNA$sim_hist_plot$data[, modality := "RNA"]
} else {
    data.table::data.table(sim = numeric(0), modality = factor(levels = c("RNA", "ATAC", "Smoothed RNA")))
}
atac_sim_data <- if (!is.null(analysis_results$ATAC$sim_hist_plot$data)) {
    analysis_results$ATAC$sim_hist_plot$data[, modality := "ATAC"]
} else {
    data.table::data.table(sim = numeric(0), modality = factor(levels = c("RNA", "ATAC", "Smoothed RNA")))
}
smoothed_rna_sim_data <- if (!is.null(analysis_results$SmoothedRNA$sim_hist_plot$data)) {
    analysis_results$SmoothedRNA$sim_hist_plot$data[, modality := "Smoothed RNA"]
} else {
    data.table::data.table(sim = numeric(0), modality = factor(levels = c("RNA", "ATAC", "Smoothed RNA")))
}

# Combine sim data, ensure modalities are factors with correct levels for plotting order
combined_sim_dt <- data.table::rbindlist(list(rna_sim_data, atac_sim_data, smoothed_rna_sim_data), fill = TRUE)

# Ensure modality factor levels are set correctly for facet/color order
if (!is.null(combined_sim_dt) && nrow(combined_sim_dt) > 0) {
    combined_sim_dt$modality <- factor(combined_sim_dt$modality, levels = c("RNA", "Smoothed RNA", "ATAC"))
    
    # Define plot labels for methods
    rna_method_short <- gsub(" .*$", "", graph_construction_details$RNA$method) # e.g., "PCA"
    atac_method_short <- gsub(" .*$", "", graph_construction_details$ATAC$method) # e.g., "Gene"
    smoothed_rna_method_short <- "Smoothed RNA" # Simple name for smoothed RNA

    sim_comparison_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(combined_sim_dt, ggplot2::aes(x = sim, color = modality, fill = modality)) +
      ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.2) +
      ggplot2::scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Modality") +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Modality") +
      ggplot2::labs(title = paste0("Comparison of Non-Zero Similarity Distributions"),
                    x = "Similarity Score", y = "Density") +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(~modality, nrow = 3, scales = "free_y") + # Use facets for clearer separation
      ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
      ggplot2::theme(plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10))

    print(sim_comparison_plot)
    ggsave("/projectnb/paxlab/phitro/CellWalkR2/R/figure/similarity_distributions_comparison.png", plot = sim_comparison_plot)
} else {
    message("No combined similarity data available for plotting comparison.")
}


# --- Interpretation Guidance ---
message("\n--- Interpretation Guidance ---")
message("1. Graph Construction Parameters:")
message("   - Review the 'Feature Graph Construction and Similarity Summary' table.")
message("   - RNA: Uses PCA on gene expression, kNN with Gaussian similarity, k=", graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors)
message("   - Smoothed RNA: Similar to RNA but on spatially aggregated data, k=", graph_params$rna_feature_k_neighbors)
message("   - ATAC: Uses Gene Activity + PCA on ATAC data, kNN with Gaussian similarity, k=", graph_params$atac_k_neighbors)
message("   - Note the comparable use of Gaussian kernel and PCA-based feature spaces (where applicable) for RNA and ATAC, facilitating comparison.")
message("2. Sparsity and Edge Count:")
message("   - Higher 'Sparsity_Pct_Zeros' (lower 'Num_Edges') indicates sparser graphs.")
message("   - Expect ATAC to potentially remain sparser due to the nature of ATAC profiles and peak-to-gene mapping compared to direct gene expression.")
message("3. Similarity Distribution:")
message("   - The plots compare the distribution of non-zero similarity scores across modalities.")
message("   - A broader distribution and higher median/mean scores suggest more robust connectivity.")
message("   - Compare the shapes for RNA, Smoothed RNA, and ATAC to understand how graph connectivity differs between modalities and after spatial smoothing.")
message("4. ATAC Gene Activity and PCA Analysis:")
message("   - Check the 'ATAC Gene Activity Matrix' sparsity and 'genes_per_cell_atac' metrics.")
message("   - High sparsity or few active genes per cell may imply highly specific ATAC profiles, potentially leading to sparser graphs.")
message("   - The 'ATAC PCA Variance Explained' plot (if generated) helps justify the chosen `atac_pca_dims`.")
message("5. Validation Plots:")
message("   - Review spatial coherence plots (`plotSpatialGraphCoherence` and `assessSpatialGraphCoherenceOverall` outputs) to check if feature graphs preserve spatial neighborhoods.")
message("   - Compare plots against random cell connections (`validateGraphCoherenceWithRandom`) to assess statistical significance of observed patterns.")
message("6. Conclusion for PI:")
message("   - Summarize findings regarding graph properties and spatial coherence for each modality.")
message("   - Discuss how smoothed RNA graph's properties compare to original RNA and ATAC graphs.")
message("   - 'The smoothed RNA graph shows an intermediate sparsity and similarity distribution between the original RNA and ATAC graphs, suggesting spatial aggregation bridges some connectivity differences.'")
message("   - 'The validation metrics (coherence scores, comparison to random) will indicate how well each graph represents spatial relationships, informing downstream CellWalker2 integration.'")
```





```{r}
a = readRDS(file.path(output_philipp, 'cellwalker2_map_results_list.rds'))
```
